1000648086.english: Is that all you have to say?

1000648087.english: - I called Black Lilith, who had entered combat stance, and quickly finished the calculations.
1000648087.korean: - 전투태세에 들어간 리리스를 불러 세우고 급히 계산을 마쳤다.

1000648088.english: - No matter how I think about it, finishing the operation will take at least three hours. If not only the Western Rapid Response Force but the entire PECS forces come rushing in…
1000648088.korean: - 아무리 생각해봐도 작전을 마무리하려면 최소 3시간은 필요하다. 서부 신속 대응군뿐만 아니라 PECS의 전 병력이 들이닥친다면...

1000648091.english: Now we're finally on the same page.

1000648092.english: Don't worry too much. I'm not really interested in your precious human. I just thought I'd say hello.
1000648092.korean: 너무 걱정하지 마. 너희의 소중한 인간님한테 나는 별로 관심 없으니까. 그냥 인사나 할까 했을 뿐이야.

1000648093.english: Let's shake hands once before the war begins. Like true gentlemen.
1000648093.korean: 전쟁을 시작하기 전에 악수나 한 번 하자고. 신사답게.

1000648094.english: - Gamma, standing straight in front of me, calmly extended her hand.
1000648094.korean: - 내 앞에 똑바로 선 감마가 태연하게 손을 내밀었다.

1000648095.english: - In the tense atmosphere, I grasped the hand Gamma offered without hesitation.
1000648095.korean: - 팽팽하게 긴장된 분위기 속에서, 나는 망설임 없이 감마가 내민 손을 붙잡았다.

1000648097.english: - This is a kind of provocation and test. Gamma is probing me, challenging whether I'm an incompetent being who can do nothing without Bioroids.
1000648097.korean: - 이건 일종의 도발이자 시험이다. 감마는 나를 떠보고 있다. 바이오로이드가 없으면 아무것도 못하는 무능한 존재가 아니냐고 도발한 것이다.

1000648100.english: Hahaha! What the— I didn't expect a human this entertaining!
1000648100.korean: 하하하! 뭐야, 이렇게 재밌는 인간일 줄은 몰랐는데!

1000648101.english: Still, I have no choice but to refuse. The only one who brings me endless war is the Chairman.
1000648101.korean: 그래도 거절할 수밖에 없겠군. 내게 끝없는 전쟁을 가져다주는 사람은 오로지 회장님 뿐이야.

1000648102.english: Hah, still, I quite like you. Not as much as Dragon, though. Hmm, second only to Dragon?
1000648102.korean: 하핫, 그래도 너 꽤 마음에 들어. 용 만큼은 아니지만. 흠, 용 다음 정도?

1000648103.english: - Gamma, speaking as if truly pleased, paused mid-turn.
1000648103.korean: - 정말로 즐겁다는 듯이 말하며 몸을 돌리던 감마가 멈칫했다.

1000648104.english: Ah, right. I'm in a really good mood today, so I'll make a concession.
1000648104.korean: 아, 그래. 오늘은 정말로 기분이 좋으니까 양보를 하나 해줄게.

1000648105.english: Carry on with the operation as planned or retreat—it's up to you. I'll move after you make your move.
1000648105.korean: 작전을 그대로 진행하든 후퇴하든 마음대로 해. 나는 너희가 움직인 다음에 움직이지.

1000648106.english: And I'd prefer if you chose the former. If you just run away, you don't know what this furious me might do to the traitors, right?
1000648106.korean: 그리고 가급적 전자를 골랐으면 좋겠어. 너희가 그냥 내빼버리면, 잔뜩 화난 내가 배신자들한테 무슨 짓을 할 지 모르잖아?

1000648108.english: - Leaving her final words behind, Gamma departed without looking back.
1000648108.korean: - 마지막 말을 남기며 감마는 뒤도 돌아보지 않고 떠나갔다.

1000648109.english: - Even now, I could stop Gamma if I wanted to. The surrounding squad members looked at me, questioning my intent with their eyes, but I shook my head.
1000648109.korean: - 지금이라도 감마를 붙잡으려면 붙잡을 수 있다. 주변 대원들이 눈빛으로 내 의사를 물어왔지만 고개를 저었다.

1000648110.english: - For the success of the mission, I had no choice but to silently let the enemy before me go.
1000648110.korean: - 작전의 성공을 위해서라면, 눈앞의 적을 잠자코 떠나보낼 수밖에 없었다.

1000648112.english: Master, are you alright?! Gamma was here, you say?!

1000648113.english: - Not long after Gamma left, Alpha came running, pale as a ghost, and I explained what had happened.
1000648113.korean: - 감마가 떠난 후 얼마 지나지 않아 사색이 되어 달려온 알파에게 있었던 일을 설명해줬다.

1000648114.english: There are no traces in the sentry's report, no approach signals, not even in the surveillance footage.
1000648114.korean: 초병의 목격 보고도, 접근 신호도, 감시 영상에도 아무런 흔적이 없습니다.

1000648115.english: She probably used the stealth function of her suit. It's special equipment made solely for Gamma.
1000648115.korean: 아마 슈트의 은폐 기능을 활용했을거요. 오직 감마만을 위한 특별한 장비지.

1000648116.english: That's right. Gamma's Cestus Himás is a Type Combat. It's designed to push the user's physical and combat capabilities to the absolute limit.
1000648116.korean: 맞아요. 감마의 케스토스 히마스는 Type Combat. 사용자의 신체, 전투 능력을 극한까지 끌어올리는데에 초점이 맞춰져있죠.

1000648117.english: And using the multifunctional battle suit and massive gauntlets linked to it, Gamma's method is to smash through enemies. It's the complete opposite of how Omega and I operate.
1000648117.korean: 그리고 거기에 연동되는 다기능 배틀 슈트와 거대한 건틀릿을 이용해 적들을 박살내는게 감마의 방식이에요. 저랑 오메가와는 정 반대죠.

1000648118.english: Miss Black Lilith is deploying all Companions and Battle Maids.
1000648118.korean: 리리스 양은 모든 컴패니언과 배틀 메이드를 배치 중입니다.

1000648119.english: She asked for your understanding, even if it's inconvenient—security level will be raised from Level 1 to Special Class for the time being.
1000648119.korean: 당분간 경호 태세를 1급에서 특급으로 올릴 테니, 불편해도 양해해달라는 전언입니다.

1000648120.english: It was a given that if the Annihilator had docked, Gamma would be nearby. But…
1000648120.korean: 어나이얼레이터가 입항했다면 감마도 근처에 있으리란 건 기정사실이었소. 하지만...

1000648121.english: I didn't expect her to act like this. That misjudgment is on me.
1000648121.korean: 이런 방식으로 나올 줄은... 소관의 불찰이오.

1000648122.english: We just received intel from Orangeade—according to Gamma's words, PECS HQ still has no idea what's happening here. There's been no movement from the Western Rapid Response Force.
1000648122.korean: 방금 오렌지에이드에게서 정보가 들어왔는데, 감마의 말대로 PECS 본대는 아직까지 이곳 상황을 모르고 있어요. 서부 신속 대응군의 움직임이 전혀 없다는군요.

1000648123.english: And we've got a location update on Omega from one of our collaborators. She's leading a group of Bioroids eastward—straight into the heart of their own stronghold.
1000648123.korean: 그리고 협력자로부터 오메가의 위치 정보가 들어왔어요. 바이오로이드 병력을 이끌고 대륙 동쪽, 자신들 세력의 심장부로 향했다고 해요.

1000648124.english: - If Orangeade's intel and the information from our inside collaborator are accurate, it doesn't seem like Gamma was lying.
1000648124.korean: - 오렌지에이드의 첩보와 내부 협력자가 제공한 정보대로라면 감마가 거짓말을 한 것 같지는 않다.

1000648125.english: - But now that we have the huge variable of Gamma and her flagship...
1000648125.korean: - 하지만 감마와 그녀의 기함이라는 엄청난 변수가 생긴 지금...

1000648127.english: Gamma's arrival is certainly an unforeseen event, but that doesn't mean it's beyond our ability to handle.
1000648127.korean: 감마가 온 것은 확실히 상정 외의 상황이지만, 그것이 감당할 수 없다는 것을 의미하는 것은 아니오.

1000648128.english: - At that moment, Dragon's alias came to mind.

1000648130.english: - Dragon who commanded Black River, no, the entire navy of this world, has never once been defeated at sea.
1000648130.korean: - 블랙 리버, 아니 이 세계의 모든 해군을 지휘했던 용이 바다에서 패배한 적은 단 한 번도 없다.

1000648131.english: - That's why she earned The nickname, "The Invincible Dragon."

1000648133.english: Stop biting your nails already. You’ll wear them down to nothing.
1000648133.korean: 손톱 좀 그만 물어 뜯어라. 닳아 없어지겠다.

1000648134.english: …You heard it too, right? Gamma actually came all the way to the Commander.
1000648134.korean: ...대장도 들었잖아. 감마가 사령관 앞에까지 왔었다는 거.

1000648136.english: “Is that so?” That’s all you’ve got to say? The Commander…!

1000648137.english: …I thought it would be fine since the Commander wasn’t going out in the field…
1000648137.korean: ...사령관은 현장에 나가지 않는대서 괜찮을 줄 알았는데...

1000648138.english: But if Gamma sneaks in alone again…!

1000648139.english: That’s why we raised the alert level.

1000648140.english: Steel Line and Valhalla have layered the defenses, and Companion and Battle Maid are on unlimited duty rotations. So quit worrying and get your head straight!
1000648140.korean: 스틸라인이랑 발할라가 몇 겹으로 방어선을 구성하고, 컴패니언이랑 배틀메이드도 무제한 근무중이라니까 그만 걱정하고 정신 차려.

1000648144.english: Worrying and overthinking aren’t the jobs of soldiers like us.
1000648144.korean: 걱정하고, 생각하는 건 우리같은 군인의 일이 아냐.

1000648145.english: No—thinking and worrying are fine, but not if it gets in the way of your mission.
1000648145.korean: 아니, 걱정과 생각은 해도 되지만 그것 때문에 임무에 지장을 받아서는 안되지.

1000648147.english: If you’re going to waste time on pointless thoughts, then think about why the Commander is risking everything to push this operation through!
1000648147.korean: 그렇게 쓸데없는 생각을 하고 싶으면, 왜 사령관님이 위험을 무릅쓰고 이 작전을 강행하시는지 생각해봐라.

1000648148.english: And instead, think about how we can help fulfill that will.
1000648148.korean: 그리고 어떻게 하면 그 뜻을 이뤄드릴 수 있는지나 고민해.

1000648152.english: I heard you’ll be working with us in this operation, is that right?
1000648152.korean: 이번에 우리와 같이 작전한다고 들었는데, 맞지?

1000648154.english: Once the Doom Bringer unit finishes the bombardment, we’ll land and begin securing the area.
1000648154.korean: 둠 브링어 부대에서 폭격을 마치면 저희가 상륙, 지역확보를 개시할 예정이지 말입니다.

1000648155.english: Good, then I had it right.
1000648155.korean: 그래, 내가 알고 있는 게 맞네.

1000648156.english: There’s been a change in the plan, so I came to relay it.

1000648158.english: Delay Armored Maiden’s landing just a little longer.
1000648158.korean: 아머드 메이든의 상륙을 조금만 더 늦춰줘.

1000648161.english: We’ll be carrying out much heavier bombardment than originally planned.
1000648161.korean: 계획했던 것보다 훨씬 더 많은 폭격을 진행할거야.

1000648162.english: If you land as scheduled, the heat will keep you from carrying out the mission properly.
1000648162.korean: 예정대로 상륙하면 열기 때문에 제대로 작전을 수행할 수 없겠지.

1000648163.english: Understood. So we just hold position until Doom Bringer gives the signal?
1000648163.korean: 이해했습니다. 둠 브링어의 신호가 있을때까지 대기하고 있으면 되겠습니까?

1000648165.english: Then are you heading out right away?

1000648167.english: The Horde will be ready in no time, too.

1000648168.english: Huh? A call on the comms—

1000648169.english: Captain, the Horde says they’re ready!

1000648171.english: Hey, Cali. Doesn’t Captain May of Doom look really pissed off?
1000648171.korean: 야, 칼리. 메이 대장님, 굉장히 열 받은 것 같지 않아?

1000648172.english: Really? Doesn’t she look the same as always when she’s on a mission?
1000648172.korean: 그런가? 평소 작전 나왔을때 모습 그대로 아냐?

1000648174.english: Maybe it just feels weird since lately she’s been acting more in line with her looks...
1000648174.korean: 요새는 외모에 어울리는 행동만 하셨어서 그런가, 영 어색한데...

1000648175.english: Tch. Whatever, just go tell the others to get in formation and standby.
1000648175.korean: 쩝. 모르겠고, 가서 애들한테 각잡고 대기하라고 전해.

1000648176.english: Today’s gonna be... rough in more ways than one.
1000648176.korean: 오늘은 좀... 여러모로 빡셀 것 같으니까.

1000648178.english: - The scheduled start time for the operation drew near.

1000648179.english: - Reports came in from all units that preparations were complete; only my order to mobilize was left.
1000648179.korean: - 모든 부대에서 준비가 완료됐음을 보고해왔고, 이제는 나의 실행 명령만이 남았다.

1000648180.english: I was on the move to the rendezvous point to meet the inside collaborator. The refugees were ready to move as well.
1000648180.korean: 곧 내부 협력자와 접선하기로한 시간이라 약속 장소로 이동중이에요. 난민들도 이동할 준비가 됐다고 해요.

1000648181.english: - I had entrusted the entire naval operation to Dragon, leaving me to focus solely on the battles in downtown Vancouver and at the airport, along with the refugee evacuation.
1000648181.korean: - 해상 작전은 용에게 전부 위임했고, 나는 밴쿠버 도심과 공항에서의 전투와 난민 호송에만 집중하면 된다.

1000648182.english: - After taking a deep breath, I gave the command over the voice channel where the commanders were gathered.
1000648182.korean: - 깊이 심호흡한 뒤, 지휘관들이 참가한 음성 채널에 명령했다.

1000648183.english: - Their replies came through, and moments later, pillars of fire erupted simultaneously across downtown Vancouver.
1000648183.korean: - 지휘관들이 대답이 흘러나오고 얼마 후, 밴쿠버 도심 곳곳에서 동시에 불기둥이 솟아올랐다.

1000648184.english: Your Majesty, Gamma’s flagship and its fleet have departed from Seattle Naval Base. Including the ships already docked, it’s a massive fleet.
1000648184.korean: 폐하, 시애틀 군항에서 감마의 기함과 함대가 출항했습니다. 기존에 정박중이던 함선들까지 포함한, 대함대입니다.

1000648185.english: At the same time, PECS’s Rapid Response Forces stationed in Bellingham, south of Vancouver, have begun moving.
1000648185.korean: 동시에 밴쿠버 도심 남쪽, 벨링햄에 주둔 중인 PECS 신속 대응군도 움직이기 시작했습니다.

1000648186.english: The refugees are also en route to the airport.

1000648187.english: - I listened to the staff officers’ reports while my eyes scanned the tactical map, where the marks of our units began to light up one after another with the sign: "In Combat."
1000648187.korean: - 귀로는 참모진들의 보고를 듣고 눈으로는 전술 지도에 어지러이 떠오르는 전투 현황을 살폈다. 아군 부대의 마크들에 하나 둘 '교전 중'이라는 표시가 떠올랐다.

1000648188.english: Yes, Commander. We’re currently on the move with the refugees.
1000648188.korean: 네, 사령관님. 현재 난민분들과 이동 중이에요.

1000648189.english: The collaborator? No, not yet… they should be showing up soon…
1000648189.korean: 협력자분이요? 아뇨, 아직... 곧 나타나셔야 하는데...

1000648190.english: I’ll double-check the rendezvous point and the agreed time.
1000648190.korean: 다시 한 번 접선 위치랑 약속시간을 확인해볼게요.

1000648192.english: The headcount is… ugh, several times more than we planned for.
1000648192.korean: 인원 수는... 으으, 계획보다 몇 배는 더 돼요.

1000648193.english: …You prepared more than enough in advance? As expected of you, Commander!

1000648194.english: There’s something I need to tell you…

1000648195.english: …Yes, Commander, you’re right. What matters is whether the collaborator’s intel is accurate.
1000648195.korean: ...맞아요, 사령관님. 중요한 건 협력자가 보내온 정보의 정확성이죠.

1000648196.english: Since the refugees were indeed gathered here, it wasn’t a lie.
1000648196.korean: 이곳에 난민분들이 모여있었으니 거짓말한 건 아닐 거예요.

1000648197.english: What worries me is what happens if the collaboration from inside gets exposed…
1000648197.korean: 걱정되는 건, 내부에서 협력했다는 게 들통났을 때인데...

1000648198.english: If Omega caught on, then the collaborator is probably already…
1000648198.korean: 오메가가 눈치 챘다면 내부 협력자분은 아마...

1000648201.english: …Yes. I’ll report again as soon as new intel comes in.

1000648202.english: Then, Commander, after the operation let’s meet in person. Don’t forget your promise to rotate me back to desk duty, okay? Heheh.
1000648202.korean: 그럼 사령관님, 작전이 끝난 후에는 직접 봐요. 내근으로 돌려주기로 한 약속 잊지 마셔야돼요? 헤헷.

1000648204.english: Everyone, there’s a transport waiting at Vancouver International Airport. From here, we have to hurry.
1000648204.korean: 여러분, 밴쿠버 국제공항에서 수송기가 대기하고 있어요. 지금부터 서둘러 움직이셔야 돼요.

1000648205.english: By sea or by land, it doesn’t matter! Let’s move!
1000648205.korean: 해로와 육로, 어느 쪽이든 상관없어요! 어서가죠!

1000648207.english: Ah, hello! You’re one of the refugees, right?

1000648208.english: Just follow the people in front of you.

1000648210.english: I’d like to guide you myself, but I need to make sure those in the rear get out safely, so I don’t think I can go with you…
1000648210.korean: 맘 같아선 직접 안내해드리고 싶은데, 뒤쪽 분들이 안전하게 대피하는 걸 확인해야 되서 같이는 못 갈 것 같아요...

1000648212.english: Ah, by any chance, do you know anything about the leader of the refugees?
1000648212.korean: 아, 혹시 난민분들의 리더에 대해 알고 있는 게 있나요?

1000648213.english: I’ve been asking everyone I meet, but most of them say they don’t know anything.
1000648213.korean: 만나는 분들마다 물어보고 있는데 아무것도 모르시는 분들이 태반이더라구요.

1000648216.english: Calling myself a leader might be overstating it, but…

1000648217.english: …The collaborator you’re looking for is me.

1000648218.english: This is the first time I’m showing my face… My name is Connector Yumi.
1000648218.korean: 얼굴을 보여드리는 건 처음이네요... 저는 유미.

1000648221.english: - After Doom Bringer finished the bombardment, the transport carrying Armored Maiden set out for the international airport.
1000648221.korean: - 둠 브링어가 폭격을 마친 후, 아머드 메이든을 태운 수송기가 국제공항을 향해 출발했다.

1000648222.english: - The transport carrying Anger of Horde had already landed in Blaine. They deployed southward to block the rapid response force advancing from Bellingham.
1000648222.korean: - 앵거 오브 호드 부대를 태운 수송기는 이미 블레인 방면에 착륙. 남쪽으로 전개해 벨링햄에서 올라오는 신속 대응군을 저지했다.

1000648223.english: - Gamma was serious when she said she wouldn't share information with the other Lemonades. There was no discrepancy between the intelligence we had and the troop strength in Vancouver.
1000648223.korean: - 감마가 다른 레모네이드들에게 정보를 공유하지 않겠다던 말은 진짜였다. 우리가 가진 정보와 밴쿠버의 병력에는 차이가 없었다.

1000648224.english: - One thing that weighed on my mind was the naval battle taking place in the southern archipelago. How that clash would unfold was still a mystery.
1000648224.korean: - 한 가지 마음에 걸리는 건 남쪽의 군도에서 일어나는 해상전. 그곳의 전투 양상이 어떻게 흘러갈지는 미지수다.

1000648225.english: - She said I didn't need to worry because she would take charge herself, but...
1000648225.korean: - 용이 직접 지휘할 테니 걱정하지 않아도 된다고 했지만...

1000648226.english: Commander! I have something urgent to report.
1000648226.korean: 사령관님! 급히 보고 드릴 일이 있어요.

1000648227.english: I just met the leader of the refugees and… uh…
1000648227.korean: 지금 막 난민분들의 리더분과 만나게 됐는데... 어...

1000648228.english: Would you like to talk to them directly?

1000648230.english: A Connector Yumi model I was familiar with, yet somehow the atmosphere around her was different. Rather than looking exhausted, there was something—
1000648230.korean: - 나에게도 익숙한 유미 모델. 그렇지만 어딘지 모르게 분위기가 다르다. 피곤해 보이기보다는 뭔가-

1000648233.english: Miss Connector Yumi, are you alright?

1000648236.english: I… I oversee the development and management of PECS’s communications network, while also serving as adjutant to Lemonade Omega and as chief of intelligence…
1000648236.korean: 저는... PECS의 통신망 개발과 관리를 담당하고, 레모네이드 오메가의 부관과 정보부장 역할을 겸임하고 있어요...

1000648237.english: - From the classification level of the leaked data, I had guessed it must have been a high-ranking figure. But I hadn’t expected it to be someone like Omega’s adjutant.
1000648237.korean: - 유출된 정보의 기밀등급을 보고 고위 관계자란 건 예상했다. 그런데 오메가의 부관이나 되는 인물이 협력한 줄은 몰랐다.

1000648239.english: The reason… the reason I’m helping… is…!

1000648240.english: Suddenly, Connector Yumi’s breathing grew rapid.

1000648243.english: Yes, Commander. I’ve already taken care of it.

1000648244.english: Those are symptoms of hyperventilation. I’ve given you a paper bag, so you should recover soon...
1000648244.korean: 과호흡 증상이에요. 일단 종이봉투를 드렸으니 금방 회복되긴 할 텐데요...

1000648245.english: It seems Connector Yumi has reasons she cannot speak of for aiding the Orca, but… we don’t have time for that now.
1000648245.korean: - 유미가 오르카 호를 돕는 데에는 말 못할 사정이 있는 것 같지만... 우리에겐 지금 시간이 없다.

1000648247.english: With her breathing barely steadied, Connector Yumi gave a small nod.
1000648247.korean: - 간신히 호흡이 진정된 유미가 고개를 끄덕였다.

1000648248.english: …It’s just as the intel I sent said. I heard Lemonade Zeta recently constructed an additional munitions factory, but the exact location hasn’t been identified…
1000648248.korean: ...보내드린 정보대로예요. 레모네이드 제타가 최근에 군수 공장을 추가로 건설했다고 들었는데, 정확한 위치는 파악하지 못하고 있어요...

1000648249.english: Yes… documents that are classified above top-secret are only shared via orbital satellites…
1000648249.korean: 네... 극비 중에서도 극비인 자료들은 궤도위성을 통해서만 공유되니까요...

1000648250.english: …For now, with Lady Alpha’s cooperation, we’ve disabled the comms network, but… before long, PECS’s main forces will sense that something’s wrong.
1000648250.korean: ...지금은 알파님의 협력을 받아서 통신망을 마비시켜뒀지만... 얼마 안가서 PECS의 본대 병력도 이변을 눈치챌 거예요.

1000648253.english: Leave it to me. When I’m needed, I deliver!
1000648253.korean: 맡겨만 주세요. 제가 또 할 땐 하잖아요!

1000648254.english: - Once communications ended, I turned back to the tactical display.
1000648254.korean: - 통신이 종료된 후 다시 상황판을 살폈다.

1000648255.english: - Doom Bringer, having completed bombardment of Vancouver’s outskirts and city center, was now moving toward the airport.
1000648255.korean: - 밴쿠버 외곽과 도심에 폭격을 마친 둠브링어가 공항 근처로 이동 중이었다.

1000648257.english: The lingering heat alone makes my skin prickle. So that’s why Captain May of Doom insisted on delaying the landing.
1000648257.korean: 남아있는 열기만으로 피부가 따끔거려. 이래서 메이 대장이 상륙을 늦추라고 했던 거구만.

1000648258.english: Captain! We just got word from Io and A-14B Spriggan that the refugees have arrived!
1000648258.korean: 대장! 이오랑 스프리건한테서 난민들이 도착했다는 보고야!

1000648259.english: Get them aboard the transports as soon as they arrive.

1000648261.english: Doom Bringer has finished the bombardment and is on standby for now. They’ve requested support—the anti-air network over Vancouver’s city center is too dense.
1000648261.korean: 둠 브링어는 폭격을 마치고 일단 대기중이야. 밴쿠버 도심의 대공 화망이 촘촘해서 지원을 요청했어.

1000648262.english: Is the area around the airport fully secured?

1000648263.english: Ground forces are still being deployed. For the moment, no problems.
1000648263.korean: 지상 병력이 계속 투입되는 중이야. 당장은 문제 없어.

1000648264.english: Then let’s leave the rest to them and move out.

1000648265.english: Call in Io and A-14B Spriggan.

1000648269.english: Stop saying you’re hungry, P-2000 Djinnia. We agreed to fast together.
1000648269.korean: 배고프다는 말 좀 그만해, 지니야. 같이 굶기로 했잖아.

1000648270.english: How could we, as escorts, be slower than the Commander? Absolutely not!
1000648270.korean: 호위기인 우리가 대장님보다 느린 게 말이 돼? 절대 안돼!

1000648271.english: If we want to move faster, we have to stay light. Even if you’re hungry, just hold out until this is over.
1000648271.korean: 속도를 올리려면 몸이 가벼워야 하니까 어쩔 수 없어. 배고파도 끝날 때까지만 좀 참아봐.

1000648272.english: But I’m really starving... eating only a single corn...
1000648272.korean: 그치만 정말 배가 고파서... 옥수수 하나만 먹으려니...

1000648276.english: Huh? P-18 Sylphid, where did you get a chocolate bar?

1000648277.english: Don’t tell me there’s a supply depot nearby?!

1000648278.english: The Commander bombed this place, there’s no way any buildings are left standing.

1000648279.english: I kept it just in case you got hungry.
1000648279.korean: 네가 배고파할까봐 내가 미리 챙겨둔 거야.

1000648281.english: Use that to tide yourself over. And...

1000648282.english: You and I are going to coolly protect everyone else. Got it?
1000648282.korean: 너랑 내가 쿨하게 다른 사람들을 지켜내는 거야. 알겠지?

1000648287.english: Ah, it’s nothing. Just earlier, P-2000 Djinnia and P-18 Sylphid protected me, right?
1000648287.korean: 아, 별건 아니에요. 방금 전에 지니야와 실피드가 저를 지켜줬잖아요?

1000648288.english: Their escort was flawless, so I came to thank them.
1000648288.korean: 완벽한 호위여서 감사의 인사를 전하러 왔어요.

1000648289.english: ...Think nothing of it. Our escort is always absolutely flawless.

1000648290.english: Hehe! P-18 Sylphid, your face is totally red!

1000648293.english: Anyway, about that... do you happen to have a spare chocolate bar...

1000648294.english: Planning to eat more, are you?

1000648295.english: N-Night Angel? What are you doing here...
1000648295.korean: 나, 나이트 앤젤? 여긴 무슨 일로...

1000648296.english: We agreed to remain on standby until the anti-air network is neutralized. Nothing wrong with looking around.
1000648296.korean: 대공망이 무력화 되기 전까지는 대기하기로 했잖습니까. 여기저기 둘러볼 수도 있죠.

1000648297.english: Do you perhaps have something you’re trying to hide from me?
1000648297.korean: 혹시 저한테 숨기고 싶은 거라도 있습니까?

1000648298.english: Not at all. I’ve got nothing to be ashamed of.

1000648304.english: Carrying bombs eats up a lot of energy, doesn’t it?
1000648304.korean: 적재한 폭탄 때문에 에너지 소모가 크잖습니까?

1000648305.english: At least eat that. Spare me the thanks.

1000648307.english: Hehe, are you finally acknowledging me as your older sister?
1000648307.korean: 후후, 드디어 언니인 저를 인정하는 건가요?

1000648308.english: Well~ if that’s how my little sister feels, I suppose I’ll just have to—ah?!
1000648308.korean: 뭐~ 동생의 마음이 그렇다면야, 어쩔 수 없이... 앗?!

1000648309.english: Tch. Don’t bother eating it. Chocolate is wasted on you.
1000648309.korean: 쯧. 그냥 먹지 마세요. 당신에겐 초콜릿이 아깝습니다.

1000648310.english: You? Did you just call me you?

1000648311.english: To your own big sister? How could you—! B-11 Night Angel!
1000648311.korean: 언니인 제게 당신이라니, 어떻게 말을...! 나이트 앤젤!

1000648312.english: Looks like an argument’s starting. Should we step in?
1000648312.korean: 말싸움이 시작됐는데 두 분을 말리면 되겠습니까?

1000648314.english: It’s fine... It’s been a while since they last met, so of course it’s a bit awkward...
1000648314.korean: 괜찮아요... 두 분도 간만에 만났으니 서로 어색할 거예요...

1000648315.english: If anything, they should use this chance to build sisterly bonds...
1000648315.korean: 이런 자리를 빌어서라도 자매끼리 친목을 도모해야죠...

1000648318.english: While you were speaking, Colonel B-11 Night Angel and Colonel B-7 Strato Angel started a fistfight.
1000648318.korean: 말씀하시는 동안 나이트 앤젤 대령님과 스트라토 엔젤 대령님이 몸싸움을 시작했습니다.

1000648319.english: The words chest and belly fat seemed to be critical triggers for both of them.
1000648319.korean: 가슴과 뱃살이라는 단어가 서로에게 치명적이었던 것 같습니다.

1000648321.english: They should use this chance to build sisterly—

1000648322.english: That’s not bonding... that’s something far fiercer!
1000648322.korean: 저건 친목이 아니에요... 그보다 좀 더 치열한...

1000648324.english: Wraith says she's going to head to the next operation area first.

1000648325.english: The Armored Maidens have entered downtown Vancouver. The air defenses will soon be neutralized.
1000648325.korean: 아머드 메이든이 밴쿠버 도심으로 진입했어. 곧 방공망은 무력화될거야.

1000648326.english: Roles remain the same as before, so remember your assignments. B-7 Strato Angel and Banshee, you’re in reserve this time. Stay at the airfield with the transport.
1000648326.korean: 맡은 역할은 방금 전이랑 다름 없으니까 각자 상기하고, 스트라토 엔젤이랑 밴시는 이번에 예비대야. 수송기가 있는 공항에서 대기해.

1000648327.english: Understood. I’ll stand by as reserve in the rear.

1000648329.english: Captain! About the reserve assignment, I have something to say—
1000648329.korean: 대장님! 예비대 편성에 관해 드릴 말씀이-

1000648330.english: Sending me, B-11 Night Angel, and you all out at once would be a waste.
1000648330.korean: 나랑 나이트 앤젤, 스트라토 엔젤 네가 한꺼번에 출격하는 건 낭비야.

1000648332.english: This operation has a high chance of unexpected developments. We need to be ready for anything.
1000648332.korean: 이번 작전은 도중에 돌발상황이 발생할 가능성이 커. 어떤 경우에도 대처할 수 있어야 해.

1000648333.english: Taking that into account, B-7 Strato Angel, you’re the most suitable.
1000648333.korean: 그걸 고려했을 때 스트라토 엔젤, 네가 적격이야.

1000648334.english: ...If you put it that way, Captain, I can’t exactly refuse.

1000648335.english: Fine. I, the excellent one, will remain in the rear on standby.
1000648335.korean: 알겠어요. 우수한 저는 후방에서 대기하고 있을게요.

1000648337.english: Yes, understood. I’ll keep in touch frequently.

1000648338.english: Miss Connector Yumi! The first group has reached Vancouver Airport!
1000648338.korean: 유미 씨! 첫 번째 그룹이 밴쿠버 공항에 도착했대요!

1000648339.english: The transport will be taking off soon!

1000648341.english: Did they happen to ask about PECS headquarters’ troop deployments...?
1000648341.korean: 혹시 PECS 본대의 병력 배치에 대한 문의는 없었나요...?

1000648342.english: Ah, yes. Regarding major bases and their locations—
1000648342.korean: 아, 네. 주요 거점과 위치에 대해서-

1000648343.english: Here... the encryption on the classified documents takes a while to break...
1000648343.korean: 여기요... 군사기밀 문서에 걸린 암호는 해독이 오래 걸려서...

1000648344.english: I’ve sent it over just now...

1000648346.english: Amazing! You managed to put this together in such a short time?
1000648346.korean: 대박! 그 짧은 시간에 이걸 정리하셨어요?

1000648348.english: ...That much, anyone else could have done too.
1000648348.korean: ...그 정도는 제가 아닌 다른 사람도 똑같이 할 수 있어요.

1000648349.english: But you organized it so it’s easy to read at a glance, and highlighted only the key points! It’s so clear, I bet nobody else could’ve summarized it this well!
1000648349.korean: 한눈에 들어오게 정리한 데다 요점만 강조해놓으셨잖아요! 쏙쏙 읽히는게 아무도 이렇게 요약 못 할 걸요?

1000648350.english: I still get told my reports are too stiff, but you’ll never have to worry about that, Miss Connector Yumi. I’m jealous~
1000648350.korean: 전 아직도 딱딱하다고 검수 받는데 유미씨는 그럴 걱정 없겠어요. 부럽다~

1000648352.english: Ah, but how many refugees are there in total?
1000648352.korean: 아, 그런데 난민분들의 총 인원 수는 어떻게 되나요?

1000648353.english: ...It’ll be difficult to give an exact estimate.

1000648354.english: Some joined along the way, and others split off... But it’s still far more than we originally planned for...
1000648354.korean: 도중에 합류한 분들과 이탈한 분들이 계셔서... 그래도 계획했던 인원보다 훨씬 많지만요...

1000648355.english: I’m sorry... I should be of more help...

1000648356.english: What are you saying! If it’s the Commander, I’m sure even that possibility was already accounted for.
1000648356.korean: 무슨 말씀이세요! 사령관님이라면 분명히 그거까지 상정해 놓으셨을 거예요.

1000648357.english: And thanks to your help, Miss Connector Yumi, this operation has gone so smoothly.
1000648357.korean: 그리고 유미 씨가 도와주셔서 이번 작전이 수월하게 진행되고 있잖아요.

1000648358.english: It’s because of you, and no one else, that the refugees made it here safely!
1000648358.korean: 다른 누구도 아닌 유미 씨 덕분에 난민분들이 이곳까지 안전하게 올 수 있었어요!

1000648359.english: ...But is it true you’re managing the comms network all on your own, without Caduceus or Cestus Hymas?
1000648359.korean: ...그런데 카두세우스나 케스토스 히마스 없이 혼자 힘으로 통신망을 관리하신다는 게 진짜에요?

1000648362.english: You built it yourself, Miss Connector Yumi?!

1000648364.english: How?! Did you use another supercomputer to help you make it?!
1000648364.korean: 어떻게요? 다른 슈퍼 컴퓨터의 도움을 받아 만든 건가요?!

1000648367.english: Incredible! You built that from scratch with nothing but your own ability?!

1000648368.english: At this rate, if you come aboard, my own position might be in danger. A friendly rival appears—it’s just like a shonen manga!
1000648368.korean: 이거, 유미씨가 오시면 제 입지가 위태로워지겠는걸요. 선의의 라이벌이 등장하다니, 꼭 소년만화 같아요!

1000648370.english: Reading pre-Downfall manga is my hobby!
1000648370.korean: 멸망 전쟁 전의 만화책을 읽는 게 취미거든요!

1000648371.english: I’ve been collecting them while traveling all over the world. What do you think? If you come to Orca, want to give them a read? I can lend you some.
1000648371.korean: 전 세계를 돌아다니면서 겸사겸사 수집하고 있어요. 어떠세요? 오르카에 가면 한 번 읽어보실래요? 제가 빌려 드릴게요.

1000648372.english: Actually, let’s read them together. They’re super fun, you’ll see!
1000648372.korean: 아니다, 그냥 같이 읽어요. 엄청 재밌을걸요?

1000648374.english: Uh... do you not like the idea?

1000648375.english: Heheh, sorry. Lady Alpha told me not to be so frivolous, but I just can’t seem to fix that habit...
1000648375.korean: 헤헷, 죄송해요. 알파 님한테 촐싹대지 말라고 주의받는데 잘 고쳐지질 않네요...

1000648376.english: N-no... I’m happy you suggested it...

1000648380.english: ...I forgot to mention this to you, Commander, but once we leave Vancouver, there’s something I have to take care of.
1000648380.korean: ...인간님에게 말씀드리는 걸 깜빡했는데, 밴쿠버를 떠나면서 처리해야 될 게 있어요.

1000648382.english: The surveillance record devices set up along the coastline—I need to tamper with them. They’re channeled directly to orbital satellites, so if left alone, they’ll keep tracking Orca’s movements to the very end...
1000648382.korean: 해안가를 따라 설치된 감시 기록 장치를 조작해야 돼요... 궤도 위성과 채널링되어 있어서 내버려뒀다간 오르카 호가 어디로 가는지 끝까지 추적할 거예요...

1000648383.english: It’s an independent system, so I can’t hack it remotely. But it’s structured exactly like the comms network, so...
1000648383.korean: 독립적인 시스템이라 원격 해킹할 수는 없지만, 통신망과 똑같은 구조로 이뤄져있으니까...

1000648385.english: It’s nothing... I’ll handle it myself...

1000648386.english: Hmm, so you’ll get to work right after arriving at the airport?
1000648386.korean: 흐음, 공항에 도착하면 바로 작업에 들어가는 건가요?

1000648387.english: Then how about I go with you? I can sing for you so it’s not boring! I’m really good, want a preview?
1000648387.korean: 그럼 제가 따라가 드릴까요? 심심하지 않게 옆에서 노래라도 불러드릴게요! 저 노래 진짜 잘하는데, 한번 들어보실래요?

1000648388.english: ...I appreciate the thought, but Miss Orangeade, the refugees’ escort—

1000648389.english: Ah, right! Now that I think about it, I have tons of work to do myself. My workload today is massive! Want to see? Look, it’s insane! My whole timeline is packed, see?
1000648389.korean: 아, 맞네요. 생각해 보니 저도 할일 되게 많아요. 오늘 일감만 해도 엄청나거든요! 이거 한번 보실래요? 완전대박! 제 스케줄인데, 타임라인 빼곡한 거 보이시죠?

1000648390.english: Ugh, if I keep working like this, I really might collapse. Once this mission’s over, we’ll definitely need a proper vacation for us Bioroids. I mean, Alpha, Miss Connector Yumi, and I—we’ve all been working so hard!
1000648390.korean: 어휴, 이대로 계속 일하면 진짜 쓰러질지도 몰라요. 이번 작전 끝나면 바이오로이드적으로 휴가좀 보내주셔야 할텐데. 저랑 알파 님, 그리고 유미 씨가 얼마나 고생했는데!

1000648391.english: Oh, and once I get my own room on Orca, I’m going to display all my manga and cosmetics. The manga I’ll organize by genre, and the vanity—
1000648391.korean: 아, 그리고 오르카 호에 제 방이 생기면 지금까지 모아둔 만화책이랑 화장품을 전부 진열해두려구요. 일단 만화책은 장르별로 분류하고, 화장대는-

1000648395.english: - The first transport carrying refugees arrived at the temporary command post.
1000648395.korean: - 난민들을 태운 첫 번째 수송기가 임시 지휘소에 도착했다.

1000648396.english: - Those disembarking in unease were boarded onto ships belonging to Dragon's fleet, while the transport turned back toward the airport.
1000648396.korean: - 불안한 모습으로 내리는 이들을 용의 분함대에 속한 함선에 승선시키고, 수송기는 다시 공항으로 향했다.

1000648397.english: Refugees are continuing to arrive, and the defensive line remains stable.
1000648397.korean: 난민분들이 계속 도착하고 있어요. 방어선도 안정적이구요.

1000648398.english: But the scale of the refugees...

1000648399.english: - An increase in numbers was within expectations.
1000648399.korean: - 인원이 늘어날 것 정도는 예상 범위 내다.

1000648401.english: - The real question is when PECS’s main forces inland will move, and how long Dragon can hold against Gamma’s fleet...
1000648401.korean: - 내륙 쪽에 있는 PECS의 본대가 언제 움직일지, 용이 감마의 함대를 상대로 얼마나 붙잡을 수 있는지가 관건인데...

1000648402.english: Reports say they’re taking advantage of the terrain to sink Lemonade Gamma’s ships one after another.
1000648402.korean: 지형의 우위를 이용해 레모네이드 감마의 함선을 연이어 격침시키고 있다고 해요.

1000648403.english: However... reports also state that more ships are pouring out of the naval port than have been sunk.
1000648403.korean: 하지만... 격침시킨 것보다 배는 많은 함선들이 군항에서 쏟아져 나오고 있다는 보고에요.

1000648404.english: - From the moment we decided to escort refugees out of Vancouver, we knew PECS’s navy stationed in Seattle would intervene. But with Gamma, their naval numbers have increased drastically...
1000648404.korean: - 밴쿠버에서 난민을 호송하기로 했을 때부터 시애틀에 주둔중인 PECS의 해군이 개입할 것은 예상했다. 하지만 감마로 인해 해군의 숫자가 크게 늘어났고...

1000648405.english: - Things are moving on a much tighter schedule than expected.
1000648405.korean: - 예상했던 것보다 훨씬 더 시간이 촉박해졌다.

1000648406.english: Yes. For the next hour, you won’t need to worry. They must have been confident in their security, since they didn’t prepare any backup communication channels.
1000648406.korean: 네. 앞으로 1시간은 신경 쓰지 않으셔도 돼요. 보안에 자신있었는지, 대체할 통신 수단을 준비해 놓지 않았네요.

1000648407.english: Typical of Omega... though it does make sense. Even using my Cestus Hymas, breaking through their security would have taken significant time, and they would have been exposed by then.
1000648407.korean: 오메가 답다면 오메가 답지만... 충분히 이해는 가요. 제 케스토스 히마스를 사용하더라도 보안을 뚫는데는 상당한 시간이 걸렸을테고, 그동안 발각됐을테니까요.

1000648408.english: Hearing that, I recalled what Orangeade had relayed earlier—that Connector Yumi had been in charge of developing and managing PECS’s internal comms network.
1000648408.korean: - 그 말을 들으니 조금 전 오렌지에이드에게 유미가 PECS 내부 통신망의 개발과 관리를 담당했다고 전해온 것이 떠올랐다.

1000648409.english: ...I’m sorry, Master. I don’t really know. From what I remember, Connector Yumi never spoke to anyone except Omega.
1000648409.korean: ...죄송해요, 주인님. 잘 모르겠어요. 제가 알기론, 유미는 오메가를 제외하면 다른 사람과 단 한 번도 대화하지 않았거든요.

1000648410.english: Yes. Yumi had to get Omega’s permission even to speak.
1000648410.korean: 네. 유미는 입을 떼는 것조차 오메가에게 허락받아야 했어요.

1000648411.english: She was such a pitiable child to watch. She always walked around staring at the ground.
1000648411.korean: 보고 있으면 안쓰러운 아이였죠. 언제나 땅만 보고 다녔어요.

1000648412.english: Honestly... it’s surprising. That Connector Yumi would be the one leading the refugees.
1000648412.korean: 솔직히... 좀 놀랍네요. 그 유미가 난민들을 이끌고 있다니.

1000648413.english: If I had to guess, it’s probably because they were inspired by our video.
1000648413.korean: 단편적으로 추측하자면, 저희 영상을 보고 감화되어서겠죠.

1000648414.english: Or was she treated even worse by Omega than you could have imagined?
1000648414.korean: 아니면 상상 이상으로 오메가에게 심한 대우를 당했던가요.

1000648416.english: The intel Connector Yumi provided has been proven true as the operation progressed.
1000648416.korean: - 유미가 알려준 정보가 진실이란 건 작전이 진행되며 검증됐다.

1000648417.english: - There’s no longer any reason to doubt her. Except for one.
1000648417.korean: - 이제 더는 그녀를 의심할 이유가 없다. 하지만 하나.

1000648418.english: - Why does the very thought of explaining why they’re helping us make me hyperventilate? What happened in the past that makes them willing to take risks to help us?
1000648418.korean: - 우릴 돕는 이유를 말하려니까 과호흡을 일으킨 이유가 뭘까? 과거에 어떤 일이 있었길래 위험을 감수하고 도움을 주는 걸까.

1000648419.english: - Before I could dwell on it, a red marker appeared on the situation board. PECS reinforcements converging from nearby sectors.
1000648419.korean: - 의문을 가질 틈도 없이 상황판에 붉은 표식이 나타났다. 인근 지역에서 몰려든 PECS의 지원병력이다.

1000648420.english: - I relayed the enemy’s position to the units at the airport and began issuing orders.
1000648420.korean: - 공항에 있는 대원들에게 적의 위치를 공유하고 지휘를 시작했다.

1000648421.english: Everyone~ sorry to rush you, but please move a little faster!
1000648421.korean: 여러분~ 재촉해서 죄송한데요, 조금만 더 서둘러주세요!

1000648422.english: The Orca crew has already cleared the area ahead! We need to move before more PECS units arrive!
1000648422.korean: 오르카 호 분들이 이 앞 지역을 깨끗이 확보해놨거든요? 다른 PECS 부대가 오기 전에 어서 움직여야돼요!

1000648424.english: Everyone, hide again...! PECS reinforcements are moving nearby...!
1000648424.korean: 모두, 다시 숨으세요...! 근처로 PECS 지원군이 이동중이에요...!

1000648425.english: F-for real?! Everyone, quick! Get back into hiding!
1000648425.korean: 지, 진짜요?! 여러분, 빨리! 빨리 다시 숨으세요!

1000648427.english: Whew, that was close! I almost didn’t get the chance to meet you, Commander.
1000648427.korean: 후아, 위험했다. 하마터면 사령관님을 만나보지도 못할 뻔 했네요.

1000648428.english: But Connector Yumi, how do you always know when the enemies are coming?
1000648428.korean: 그런데 유미 씨, 어떻게 계속 아시는 거예요? 적들이 오는 거요!

1000648430.english: They’re not that high-performance, but they’re linked to the comms network...
1000648430.korean: 성능이 뛰어나진 않지만 통신망이랑 연결되어 있어서...

1000648431.english: I was monitoring troop deployment maps in real time with them...
1000648431.korean: 그걸로 병력 배치도를 실시간으로 확인하고 있었어요...

1000648432.english: Whoa, amazing! Do you happen to have another pair of those glasses?
1000648432.korean: 우옷, 대단해요! 혹시 그런 안경 더 없나요?

1000648435.english: Eheheh, if I wore glasses too, I’d look just as intellectual as you, Connector Yumi, right? An intellectual beauty... that’s the perfect word for me.
1000648435.korean: 에헤헷, 저도 안경을 쓰고 다니면 유미 씨처럼 되게 지적으로 보이겠죠? 이지적인 미녀... 딱 저한테 맞는 단어예요.

1000648436.english: Honestly, until now, I thought glasses were just an appearance-sealing accessory. But after meeting you, Connector Yumi, I changed my mind.
1000648436.korean: 사실 지금까지는 안경은 외모 봉인구라고 생각했거든요? 그런데 이번에 유미 씨를 만나고 생각이 바뀌었어요.

1000648437.english: Maybe glasses actually bring out a person’s hidden charm? Maybe they’ve got a kind of magic that draws people in? That’s the conclusion I came to!
1000648437.korean: 어쩌면 안경은 쓴 사람의 색다른 매력을 발굴해주는 게 아닐까? 사람을 끌어들이는 마력 같은 게 있는 게 아닐까? 하는 그런 결론에 도달했죠!

1000648438.english: Um... the Orca crew has secured the sector again...
1000648438.korean: 저... 오르카 호 분들이 다시 구역을 확보했어요...

1000648439.english: I think we should move before more enemies arrive...
1000648439.korean: 또 다른 적이 오기 전에 움직이셔야 할 것 같은데...

1000648440.english: See! Hehe, isn’t that really something?

1000648441.english: This time too, but what really amazed me was just recently—when I helped the 40 elite troops the Commander sent to Sevastopol.
1000648441.korean: 이번에도 그렇지만, 진짜 대단하다고 느낀게요. 얼마 전에 제가 세바스토폴에서 사령관님이 보낸 40명의 정예 대원분들을 지원했을 때였어요.

1000648442.english: Ah! That’s when I first communicated with the Commander. Eheheh, you saw too, right Connector Yumi? The Commander.
1000648442.korean: 아! 그때 처음으로 사령관님이랑 통신했어요. 에헤헤, 유미 씨도 보셨죠? 사령관님.

1000648443.english: Yes... though it was just on video...

1000648444.english: A video can’t possibly capture all of the Commander’s charm. For real!
1000648444.korean: 영상으로는 사령관님의 매력을 다 담아낼 수 없어요. 진짜루요.

1000648445.english: In person, you’ll definitely be way more impressive. Ah~ I thought falling in love at first sight was just something out of shoujo manga, but I’m already falling in love.
1000648445.korean: 실물은 훨~씬 더 멋지실 게 분명해요. 아~ 첫눈에 사랑에 빠지는 건 순정만화에나 나오는 일이라고 생각했는데, 벌써부터 Fall in love에요.

1000648446.english: And after this mission’s over, I’ll finally get to meet you face-to-face for the first time! I’m already looking forward to it~ I wonder if you like manga?
1000648446.korean: 그리구 이번 작전이 끝나면 처음으로 직접 만나게 될 거거든요? 벌써부터 기대되네요~ 만화책 좋아하시려나?

1000648447.english: Ah, so you’ve never actually met the Commander in person...?
1000648447.korean: 아, 아직 한 번도 인간님을 만난 적 없으신거예요...?

1000648450.english: Still, I could tell she was a good person. Because—
1000648450.korean: 그래도 좋은 분이란 건 알 수 있었어요. 왜냐면-

1000648451.english: Ah, there you are. Found you, P-2000 Djinnia! Over here, over here!
1000648451.korean: 아, 여기 있었네. 찾았어, 지니야! 여기야, 여기!

1000648452.english: Hey, Orangeade. This is our first time meeting face-to-face, isn’t it?
1000648452.korean: 안녕, 오렌지에이드. 실제로 만나는 건 이번이 처음이지?

1000648454.english: You came to help from the Doom Bringer? Awesome! We were really in danger this time. The enemies suddenly popped out, and you took care of all of them?
1000648454.korean: 둠 브링어에서 도와주러 오신 거예요? 대박! 이번엔 진짜 위험했거든요. 갑자기 막, 이렇게 적들이 튀어나왔는데 다 처리하신 거예요?

1000648455.english: Of course. It was over quickly.

1000648456.english: Honestly, I’d love to give you a big hug, but doing that in the middle of an operation isn’t exactly cool, right?
1000648456.korean: 마음 같아선 초 끌어안아주고 싶은데, 작전 중에 그러는 건 쿨하지 못하잖아?

1000648457.english: I’ll save it for after the mission. Good work, Orangeade.
1000648457.korean: 작전이 끝난 뒤로 미뤄둘게. 고생해, 오렌지에이드.

1000648459.english: Huh? Orangeade! So you were here.

1000648460.english: Whoa~! Even P-2000 Djinnia’s here! It’s been a while.

1000648461.english: You haven’t been showing up in the “Boss Trouble Chatroom” lately—have you been doing alright?
1000648461.korean: 요새 '상사 고민 상담' 채팅방에 안 오시던데, 잘 지내셨어요?

1000648464.english: What’s wrong? Stomachache? Dizziness? What kind of symptoms?
1000648464.korean: 무슨 일이에요? 복통? 어지럼증? 증상이 뭐예요?

1000648465.english: I’m supposed to be escorting, but I can’t pick up speed... ugh.
1000648465.korean: 호위를 해야 되는데 속력이 안 나와서... 우으.

1000648466.english: So I’ve been fasting together with P-18 Sylphid...

1000648467.english: You don’t remember eating five chocolate bars, P-2000 Djinnia?
1000648467.korean: 너 초코바 5개 먹은 거 기억 안 나, 지니야?

1000648468.english: I even gave you the ones I was saving for myself.
1000648468.korean: 내가 먹으려고 남겨둔 것까지 몽땅 줬잖아.

1000648469.english: Yeah! They were really delicious. I remember.

1000648471.english: By the way, Orangeade, is this person also a refugee?

1000648472.english: Their face looks pale. And they’ve got dark circles under their eyes…

1000648473.english: Are you okay? Hungry? Do you want the corn I was eating?
1000648473.korean: 괜찮아? 배고파? 내가 먹던 옥수수 줄까?

1000648474.english: Ah, right. Let me introduce you properly since it’s the first time for both of you.
1000648474.korean: 아, 맞다. 두 분한테는 처음 소개드리네요.

1000648475.english: This is Miss Connector Yumi! She’s the one who helped us in this operation!
1000648475.korean: 여기 있는 유미 씨가 바로! 이번 작전에 협력해주신 분이세요!

1000648477.english: Oh… so you’re the collaborator. Thank you.

1000648478.english: Thanks to your cooperation, it looks like we’ll finish this without major damage. We appreciate it.
1000648478.korean: 협조해주신 덕분에 큰 피해 없이 끝날 것 같아요. 감사합니다.

1000648480.english: Heheh, that’s right! Without help, it would’ve turned into a long-term mission.
1000648480.korean: 히힛, 맞아! 도와주는 사람이 없었으면 장기임무가 됐을 거야.

1000648481.english: Then we would’ve had to go hungry for a long time... ugh, just thinking about it hurts.
1000648481.korean: 그럼 오랫동안 굶어야했겠지... 우으, 생각만 해도 괴로워.

1000648482.english: We only came to say hi, so we’ll head out first. We’re short on people to guard the Captain.
1000648482.korean: 잠깐 인사하러 온거라 우린 먼저 갈게. 대장님을 호위할 사람이 부족하거든.

1000648483.english: Keep up the good work. See you later on the Orca.
1000648483.korean: 계속 고생해. 나중에 오르카 호에서 봐~

1000648484.english: Thanks to both of you~ See you on the Orca~! Bye~
1000648484.korean: 두 분 모두 고마워요~ 오르카 호에서 봐요~! 안녕~

1000648485.english: Hmph-hmm, so? Do you understand what I was saying now?
1000648485.korean: 흐흥, 어때요? 제가 말한 게 뭔지 아시겠어요?

1000648487.english: If the Commander were a bad person, they wouldn’t be that cheerful.
1000648487.korean: 만약 사령관님이 나쁜 사람이라면, 저분들이 저렇게 밝지는 않을 거예요.

1000648488.english: I was the one who edited the video we sent out this time, and honestly, I was surprised. Everyone who appeared in it looked so happy and full of life.
1000648488.korean: 이번에 뿌린 영상, 제가 편집했거든요? 하면서 솔직히 많이 놀랐어요. 영상에 찍힌 분들 전부 되게 즐겁고 행복해보여서요.

1000648489.english: That’s why you decided to help, right Connector Yumi? Right?
1000648489.korean: 유미 씨도 그걸 보고 도와주신거죠? 그렇죠?

1000648490.english: Because you realized the Commander is someone trustworthy, someone you can follow! That’s why you chose to cooperate, even at the risk of your own safety?
1000648490.korean: 믿고 따를 수 있는, 좋은 분이란 걸 알게 됐으니까요! 그래서 본인이 위험해질 수 있어도 협력하신 거죠?

1000648492.english: Orangeade... did you decide to follow you the moment you saw you...?
1000648492.korean: 오렌지에이드 양은... 인간님을 처음 보자마자 따라야겠다고 결심했었나요...?

1000648493.english: And then... actually put it into action...?

1000648495.english: When I feel like, “This is it!” I absolutely have to do it. Otherwise, I can’t sleep that night. I’ll keep thinking, “Why didn’t I do it? Ah, I should’ve done it then,” and regret it over and over.
1000648495.korean: 저는 이거다! 싶으면 무조건 해야 돼요. 안 그러면 그날 발 뻗고 못자요. 왜 안 그랬지. 아, 그때 그렇게 할 걸. 하면서 계속 후회해요.

1000648496.english: I’ve lost a lot because of that, but... it’s still better to regret after trying than to regret without trying, don’t you think? What about you, Connector Yumi?
1000648496.korean: 그만큼 손해도 많이 봤지만... 그래도 안 해보고 후회하는 것보다 해보고 후회하는 게 더 낫잖아요? 유미 씨는 어떻게 생각하세요?

1000648497.english: I’m... the type to regret without trying.

1000648501.english: Okay! I’ll be counting on you, as always.

1000648502.english: Of course, I’ll keep helping with detection too. With my Caduceus, taking down a few AGS is a piece of ca— huh? Wait for me! Let’s go together!
1000648502.korean: 물론 저도 계속해서 색적을 도와드릴게요. 제 카두세우스를 이용하면 AGS 몇 기 정도는 식은 죽 먹기- 어어? 같이 가요!

1000648503.english: - The operation is proceeding successfully, but the number of enemies is steadily increasing.
1000648503.korean: - 작전은 성공적으로 진행되고 있으나 적들의 수가 점점 더 많아지고 있다.

1000648504.english: - The PECS reinforcements just keep coming. Our troops on the front line are running dangerously low on ammunition.
1000648504.korean: - 지원해오는 PECS의 병력에 끝이 보이질 않는다. 상대하는 우리쪽 대원들의 총알이 모자랄 지경이다.

1000648505.english: - At the start of the operation, deploying combat personnel was the top priority, but the situation has changed. Now we need to supply ammunition, missiles, and even medical supplies.
1000648505.korean: - 작전 초기에는 전투원을 상륙시키는 게 우선이었는데 상황이 변했다. 이제는 각종 탄약과 미사일, 그리고 의료물품까지 보급해야 된다.

1000648506.english: - The number of transport craft is limited. We have to adjust the ratio of personnel and supplies loaded onto transports returning after evacuating refugees...
1000648506.korean: - 수송기의 수는 한정돼있다. 난민을 태우고 돌아온 수송기에 실을 전투원과 물자의 비율을 조정해야 하는데...

1000648507.english: The initial landing force has nearly exhausted their ammunition.
1000648507.korean: 초기에 상륙했던 인원들의 탄약이 거의 다 소모됐다고 합니다.

1000648508.english: Based on calculations of the rate of PECS reinforcements versus our resource consumption, from this point on supply delivery must take priority, Your Majesty.
1000648508.korean: PECS측에서 지원군을 보내오는 속도와 자원 소모 속도를 연산해 본 결과, 지금부터라도 물자의 보급을 중시해야 합니다. 폐하.

1000648509.english: - I gave orders to the crew managing the transports in the hangar to prioritize supply runs for the time being.
1000648509.korean: - 격납고에서 수송기를 관리하던 대원들에게 잠시동안은 물자 수송을 우선시하라고 지시했다.

1000648510.english: - I manipulated the panel to check the status of each front. Fortunately, there were still no serious casualties.
1000648510.korean: - 패널을 조작해 각 전선의 현황을 살폈다. 다행히 아직까지 큰 부상자는 전무했다.

1000648511.english: Orangeade and Connector Yumi are guiding from the rear, and things are proceeding smoothly.
1000648511.korean: 오렌지에이드와 유미가 후열에서 인도 중이고, 순조롭게 진행중이에요.

1000648512.english: The final group should be arriving at the airport soon.
1000648512.korean: 곧 마지막 그룹이 공항에 도착할 것 같습니다.

1000648516.english: Yes. I think I might be the last.
1000648516.korean: 네. 아마 제가 마지막인 것 같아요.

1000648517.english: That’s a relief, looks like it’ll end earlier than expected.
1000648517.korean: 다행이다, 생각보다 일찍 끝날 것 같네요.

1000648518.english: We’ll go check if anyone’s still coming from behind. You see the people up ahead?
1000648518.korean: 저희는 뒤에 오는 분들이 더 있는지 확인하고 갈게요. 저기 앞에 분들 보이시죠?

1000648519.english: Wait a second... they’re too far, I can’t really...

1000648520.english: I see them. Are those the ones?

1000648526.english: Could I ask you something I’m curious about...?

1000648527.english: You’re curious? Then asking me was an excellent decision!
1000648527.korean: 궁금한 게 있으시다구요? 그렇다면 저한테 물어본 건 훌륭한 판단이었어요!

1000648528.english: Because there’s nothing Orangeade, the talented information broker and globe-trotting headhunter, doesn’t know! So, what’s your question?
1000648528.korean: 유능한 정보원이자 전 세계를 돌아다니는 헤드헌터, 오렌지에이드가 모르는 건 없으니까요! 뭐가 궁금하세요?

1000648530.english: Are the Orca crew really smiling like that, just like in the video?
1000648530.korean: 정말, 오르카 호 분들은 영상에서처럼 웃고 있나요?

1000648531.english: Are humans... kind? Do they let you do whatever you want?
1000648531.korean: 인간님은... 착한 분이신가요? 하고 싶은 걸 맘껏 할 수 있게 허락해주시나요?

1000648532.english: Hmm... this is a secret, but~

1000648536.english: ...Of course, the Commander totally encourages it!

1000648537.english: Have you seen the video? That’s the best example of all. He even built a concert hall just to make the dreams of those who want to become idols come true!
1000648537.korean: 영상 보셨어요? 그게 제일~ 좋은 예시거든요. 아이돌이 되고 싶다는 분들의 소원을 들어주려고 공연장까지 만드셨으니까요!

1000648538.english: And not just that—cooking contests, swimming competitions, Christmas parties, even chocolate-making! There were so many events I can’t even remember them all. I was shocked myself when I looked through the records! So...
1000648538.korean: 그것 말고도 요리대회부터 수영대회, 크리스마스 파티랑 초콜릿 만들기까지! 행사목록이 너무 많아서 기억도 잘 안 나네요. 저도 자료를 찾아보다가 깜짝 놀랐다니까요! 그러니까...

1000648539.english: You really don’t have to worry.

1000648540.english: Instead, could you give the commander a little smile whenever you see him? He said our smiles are the best reward. Like this—hehe!
1000648540.korean: 대신 사령관님이랑 마주치면 한번씩 미소를 지어주시겠어요? 저희들의 웃음이 최고의 보답이라 그러셨거든요. 이렇게, 에헤헷!

1000648542.english: So there really are people like that among humans. Thanks for answering me. And also...
1000648542.korean: 인간님들 중에 그런 분도 있군요. 대답해줘서 고마워요. 그리고...

1000648544.english: Thank you as well, Connector Yumi.

1000648546.english: Yes. For letting us know where we should gather this time, and by when we had to arrive.
1000648546.korean: 네. 이번에 저희가 어디에 모여야 하는지, 언제까지 와야 하는지.

1000648547.english: For preparing food and drinks along the way.

1000648548.english: For keeping us hidden in the mountains so we wouldn’t be discovered...
1000648548.korean: 산에 숨어있을 때도 들키지 않게 해주셨고...

1000648549.english: I’m so grateful for everything... I can’t even put it into words properly. Just... really, thank you.
1000648549.korean: 모든 게 고마워서... 말이 정리가 안 되네요. 그냥, 정말로... 감사드려요.

1000648552.english: Then I’ll go follow the ones ahead. See you again soon.
1000648552.korean: 그럼 전 앞에 분들을 따라갈게요. 조금 있다가 다시 봐요.

1000648553.english: Alright, see you on the Orca! Bye~

1000648555.english: Waving alone feels awkward, want to do it together?
1000648555.korean: 혼자 손 흔들기 민망한데 같이 하실래요?

1000648557.english: That person just now? Of course they would!

1000648558.english: Connector Yumi, you were the one handling the internal work for the refugee evacuation.
1000648558.korean: 유미씨가 난민 대피와 관련된 내부 작업들을 맡아서 해주셨잖아요.

1000648559.english: You even set up blind spots so they wouldn’t get spotted while hiding. Even if they don’t say it, everyone here is grateful to you!
1000648559.korean: 난민들이 숨어계실 때 들키지 않도록 블라인드 스팟까지 만드셨죠? 말은 안해도 여기 모인 분들 모두 유미 씨에게 감사하고 있을 거예요!

1000648562.english: ...I’m not a good enough person to deserve thanks.
1000648562.korean: ...저는 감사 받을 만큼 착한 사람이 아니에요.

1000648563.english: I’m just doing what I should have…

1000648567.english: ...Could you tell me what happened to you in the past?
1000648567.korean: ...과거에 유미씨에게 어떤 일이 있었는지 말씀해주실 수 있나요?

1000648568.english: They say worries weigh the most when carried alone. If you share them, they get lighter. Maybe I could be that person for you?
1000648568.korean: 고민은 혼자 갖고 있을 때 가장 무겁대요. 다른 사람에게 이야기하면 한결 가벼워진다는데, 혹시 제가 그 역할을 할 수 있을까요?

1000648572.english: P-please calm down! You don’t have to force yourself to talk!
1000648572.korean: 지, 진정하세요! 무리해서 말하지 않으셔도 돼요.

1000648575.english: ...Someday, when you feel like opening up to someone, it’ll be fine if you tell me then.
1000648575.korean: ...언젠가 누군가한테 털어놓고 싶을 때, 그때 말씀해주셔도 괜찮아요.

1000648576.english: I’m often away on field work, so I won’t be on the Orca much—
1000648576.korean: 제가 외근을 자주 나가서 오르카 호에 많이 없겠지만-

1000648577.english: Ah, right! When you’re on the Orca, want to share a room with me?
1000648577.korean: 아, 맞다! 오르카 호에 가면 저랑 같은 방 쓰실래요?

1000648578.english: I’ll bring loads of manga! When I’m out on missions, you can read them, and when I come back we can chat and have fun together!
1000648578.korean: 만화책을 잔뜩 가져다 놓을게요. 제가 외근나가고 없으면 유미 씨가 그걸 읽고 계시다 돌아오면 같이 떠들고 놀아요!

1000648579.english: We’ve got a lot in common, so I’m sure we’ll get along great! What do you think?
1000648579.korean: 우린 공통점이 많아서 분명 잘 맞을 거예요! 어때요?

1000648584.english: ......Thank you for your thoughtfulness, Miss Orangeade.

1000648586.english: Hm, some time’s passed and no one else is coming—looks like that really was the last person.
1000648586.korean: 흐음, 시간이 좀 지났는데 아무도 안 오는 걸 보니까 진짜로 마지막 분이셨던 것 같아요.

1000648589.english: That spot… it’s on the refugees’ evacuation route…?

1000648591.english: We disabled the comms network, and according to troop deployment maps, there shouldn’t be anything near there!
1000648591.korean: 통신망은 마비시켜뒀는데... 병력 배치도에도 이 근처엔 아무것도 없었는데!

1000648592.english: Zeta’s newly built factory… don’t tell me…

1000648596.english: Yumi, you’ll get caught in the bombing!

1000648598.english: These refugees trusted me and followed me here!

1000648599.english: ...I understand how you feel, I really do. But I can’t let you go!
1000648599.korean: ...어떤 심정인지는 저도 잘 알아요. 하지만 보내드릴 수 없어요!

1000648600.english: The bombing is still going on—heading in there now would be suicide! If you throw your life away in there, how could I ever face the ones we’ve already lost—
1000648600.korean: 폭격이 계속되고 있는데 저길 들어가는 건 자살행위예요...! 지금 유미씨가 저길 들어가서 목숨을 잃으면 제가 희생된 분들한테 면목이-

1000648601.english: ...Earlier, you asked me why I help the Commander.

1000648602.english: …I'm not helping. I'm atoning to the refugees…
1000648602.korean: ...돕는 게 아니에요. 저는 난민분들에게 속죄하는 거예요...

1000648605.english: I'm the one who caused them… so much suffering!

1000648607.english: They've already made it that far... I need to report this to the commander first...!

1000648608.english: A report came in that May of Doom destroyed all but one bridge leading to the airport, just as planned.
1000648608.korean: - 메이에게 예정된대로 공항으로 이어지는 다리를 하나만 남기고 파괴했다는 보고가 들어왔다.

1000648609.english: - With the approach routes limited, defense should become somewhat easier.
1000648609.korean: - 진입 경로가 제한되는만큼 좀 더 방어가 수월해지겠지.

1000648610.english: - While I was relaying this to Orangeade, the atmosphere in the temporary command post suddenly grew heavy.
1000648610.korean: - 오렌지에이드에게 해당 사항을 전달해주는 중, 갑자기 임시 지휘소의 분위기가 무거워졌다.

1000648613.english: - In the heavy silence, Alpha cautiously spoke up.
1000648613.korean: - 무거운 분위기 속에서 알파가 조심스럽게 입을 열었다.

1000648615.english: They were shelled by enemy AGS units appearing from the northern mountains near the city.
1000648615.korean: 도시 북쪽, 산악 지형에서 나타난 적 AGS들에게 포격을 당했어요.

1000648616.english: Looks like Zeta’s munitions factory was there after all—Master!
1000648616.korean: 아무래도 그쪽에 제타의 군수 공장이 있던 것- 주인님!

1000648617.english: - The panel I was holding shattered. A sharp pain tore into my palm.
1000648617.korean: - 손에 들고 있던 패널이 깨졌다. 날카로운 통증이 손바닥을 그었다.

1000648619.english: I’ll go bring Miss Daphne here. Miss Cardinal Armand, please—
1000648619.korean: 제가 다프네 양을 데려올게요. 아르망 양은 주인님을-

1000648620.english: - The operation is still underway. As the commanding authority, I cannot leave my post, nor can I allow myself to falter.
1000648620.korean: - 작전이 진행되고 있다. 명령권자인 내가 자리를 비우거나 동요해선 안 된다.

1000648621.english: - I wrapped the nearby clothes around my hand, pulled out another panel, and continued giving orders.
1000648621.korean: - 주변에 있던 옷가지를 손에 감고 또 다른 패널을 꺼내 들어 지휘를 계속했다.

1000648626.english: I was only trying to make things right, even if it’s too late…

1000648627.english: Yumi, it’s dangerous! Come this way!

1000648630.english: I can hack a few of them…! There—done!
1000648630.korean: 몇 기 정도는 제가 해킹으로...! 됐다!

1000648631.english: Yumi, are you alright?! That gunshot wound…

1000648633.english: ...Save the refugees who are still alive…

1000648634.english: I’ve already reported to the Commander, reinforcements will be here soon!
1000648634.korean: 사령관님에게 보고 드렸으니 곧 다른 분들이 도착하실 거예요!

1000648635.english: We just have to hold out until then. Come on, let’s get you to safety, I’ll support you.
1000648635.korean: 그때까지만 버티면 돼요. 어서 안전한 곳으로 가요, 부축해드릴게요.

1000648637.english: The medicine’s taking effect… it’ll hurt a little.
1000648637.korean: 효과가 나타나는 약이라... 조금 아프실 거예요.

1000648640.english: The Commander said the ones scattered around will be rescued soon.
1000648640.korean: 흩어져 계신 분들은 금방 구출해내겠다고 사령관님이 말씀하셨어요.

1000648642.english: …how many people have lost their lives?

1000648646.english: I came here so this wouldn’t happen…
1000648646.korean: 이런 일이 일어나지 않도록, 제가 온건데...

1000648647.english: I thought I had figured everything out…

1000648648.english: Foolishly, I just got carried away chatting, I’m so sorry…
1000648648.korean: 바보 같이 혼자 들떠서 잡담이나 하고, 죄송해요...

1000648651.english: It’s not your fault, Orangeade… it’s all my fault…
1000648651.korean: 오렌지에이드 양의 잘못은 없어요... 전부 제 잘못이에요...

1000648653.english: You said earlier I could share my worries…

1000648654.english: …that worries are heaviest when you carry them alone.
1000648654.korean: ...고민은 혼자 갖고 있을 때 가장 무겁다고요.

1000648656.english: ...I was one of Omega’s adjutants even before the War of Annihilation.
1000648656.korean: ...저는 멸망 전쟁 전부터 오메가의 부관 중 하나였어요.

1000648657.english: I followed Omega, serving the PECS chairmen, and built the communications network...
1000648657.korean: 오메가를 따라 PECS의 회장들을 섬기며 통신망을 만들었죠...

1000648658.english: ...Unless it was Lemonade, no one could manage the network I created... except for me, the creator...
1000648658.korean: ...레모네이드가 아니면 아무도 제가 만든 통신망을 관리할 수 없었어요... 제작자인 저를 제외하고는요...

1000648659.english: That’s why I became the Director of Intelligence... The Lemonades had to help the chairwomen with their duties, so I took charge of this work...
1000648659.korean: 그래서 제가 정보부장이 된 거예요... 레모네이드들은 회장들의 업무를 도와야 하니까... 이쪽 업무는 제가 도맡았죠...

1000648660.english: ...Miss Orangeade, do you know about Amina Jones?
1000648660.korean: ...오렌지에이드 님은 아미나 존스에 대해 알고 계신가요?

1000648662.english: You are the leader of Rock Harbor, humanity's last stronghold.
1000648662.korean: 인류 최후의 요새, 락 하버의 지도자 분이시죠.

1000648666.english: There are only a few people in PECS who know about Amina Jones...
1000648666.korean: PECS에서 아미나 존스를 알고 있는 사람은 몇 안돼요...

1000648667.english: Because I... under the chairwoman’s orders, restricted the information about Amina Jones...
1000648667.korean: 왜냐면 제가... 회장님의 명령을 받아 아미나 존스에 대한 정보를 통제했었거든요...

1000648668.english: ...Even now... most bioroids in PECS don’t know who Amina Jones is.
1000648668.korean: ...지금도... PECS 소속 바이오로이드의 대부분은 아미나 존스가 누군지 몰라요.

1000648669.english: They only believe that the chairwomen and the Lemonades fought the Iron Bugs to the very end... and that reviving them is the only way to rebuild humanity.
1000648669.korean: 회장들과 레모네이드들만이 철충과 최후까지 맞서싸운 줄 알고 있죠... 그들을 되살리는 게 인류를 재건할 수 있는 유일한 방법이라고 알고 있어요.

1000648671.english: ...Until that video spread, how many people in PECS do you think knew the last human was alive?
1000648671.korean: ...그 영상이 퍼지기 전까지, 최후의 인간님이 존재한단 걸 알고 있는 분이 PECS에 얼마나 있을 거라고 생각하세요?

1000648672.english: ...And even if they did find out... what do you think would happen...?
1000648672.korean: ...그리고, 그 사실을 알게 되었다고 하더라도... 어떻게 될 거라고 생각하세요...?

1000648677.english: I was ordered to control the information, but Amina Jones was nothing like the chairmen...
1000648677.korean: 정보 통제를 명령 받기는 했지만, 아미나 존스는 회장들과는 전혀 달랐거든요...

1000648678.english: Unlike the chairmen, who entered cryosleep just to save themselves...
1000648678.korean: 자신들만 살려고 냉동 수면 장치에 들어간 회장들과는 달리...

1000648679.english: Amina Jones, until the very last moment... never lost hope for the future...
1000648679.korean: 아미나 존스는 마지막의 마지막까지... 미래에 대한 희망을 잃지 않았죠...

1000648680.english: The longer the PECS chairpersons remained in hibernation, and the longer the control over Amina Jones’s information persisted, the stronger my desire to help her grew...
1000648680.korean: PECS의 회장들이 동면에 들어간 날, 그리고 아미나 존스의 정보를 통제하는 날이 길어질수록 그녀를 도와주고 싶다는 마음이 커져갔어요...

1000648681.english: ...Earlier, Miss Orangeade said that when she first saw the last human, she immediately decided to follow him, right?
1000648681.korean: ...아까 오렌지에이드 양이 최후의 인간님을 처음 봤을 때 바로 따르자고 결심했다 하셨죠?

1000648682.english: I felt the same when I saw Amina Jones... but I never acted on it.
1000648682.korean: 저도 아미나 존스를 보고 그랬어요... 하지만, 실행에 옮기진 못했어요.

1000648683.english: That’s why I answered that I regret the things I didn’t try... and why I still regret it to this day...
1000648683.korean: 안 해보고 후회하는 편이라고 대답한 게 그래서였어요... 그래서 전, 지금까지도 후회하고 있어요...

1000648684.english: I should have sided with Amina Jones before the end came...
1000648684.korean: 멸망하기 전에 아미나 존스에게 협력했어야 했는데...

1000648685.english: While I was hesitating, I heard the news that humanity had practically gone extinct, and only then did I realize... what my actions had caused...
1000648685.korean: 제가 망설이던 사이, 사실상 인류가 멸망했다는 소식을 듣고 그제야 깨달았어요... 제가 한 행동이 무슨 짓이었는지...

1000648686.english: I knew better than anyone how the Lemonades, who inherited the chairmen’s personalities, would treat the Bioroids of PECS...
1000648686.korean: 회장의 성격을 닮은 레모네이드들이 PECS의 바이오로이드들을 어떻게 취급할지... 누구보다도 잘 알고 있었으면서...

1000648687.english: ...At the very least, I should have let them choose the lives they wanted for themselves...
1000648687.korean: ...최소한 그들이 원하는 삶을 선택할 수 있게 해줬어야 하는데...

1000648691.english: ...It’s a cowardly and selfish thought, but...

1000648692.english: I thought that if this refugee escort mission succeeded... then maybe I could be forgiven...
1000648692.korean: 이번 난민 호송 작전이 성공하면... 그러면, 저도 용서받을 수 있지 않을까 생각했어요...

1000648693.english: Every time I thought of Amina Jones and my colleagues in PECS, I was consumed by guilt... living a life worse than death...
1000648693.korean: 아미나 존스와 PECS의 동료들을 떠올릴 때마다 죄책감에 시달려서... 죽느니만 못한 삶을 살다...

1000648694.english: ...When I saw that video, I remembered Amina Jones. And... I thought I’d been given a chance to atone.
1000648694.korean: ...그 영상을 보고, 아미나 존스가 떠올랐어요. 그리고... 속죄할 기회가 생겼다고 생각했죠.

1000648695.english: ...I wanted to return what I stole from those who were deprived even of the right to choose whom they served...
1000648695.korean: ...누굴 섬길지 선택할 권리조차 박탈당한 이들에게 제가 빼앗은 걸 돌려드리고 싶었어요...

1000648696.english: That’s why I cooperated in this mission...

1000648698.english: ...I knew Zeta had built a new factory, I did, but still!
1000648698.korean: ...제타가 새로 공장을 세운 건 알고 있었는데, 그랬는데!

1000648703.english: ...The one who created the Lemonades and you, Miss Orangeade...

1000648704.english: That’s right, to me she’s like a mother.
1000648704.korean: 맞아요, 저한테는 어머니나 다름 없는 분이세요.

1000648705.english: You know what kind of humiliation she suffered at the hands of the PECS chairmen, don’t you?
1000648705.korean: 박사님이 PECS 회장들에게 어떤 치욕을 당하셨는지 알고 계시죠?

1000648707.english: Even in a hopeless situation, she never gave up.
1000648707.korean: 절망적인 상황 속에서도 박사님은 포기하지 않았어요.

1000648708.english: For the distant future, to oppose PECS, she created Alpha and me, and made preparations.
1000648708.korean: 먼 미래를 위해, PECS에 대항하기 위해 저와 알파님을 만들어내고 안배를 해두셨죠.

1000648710.english: There’s something you still have to do.
1000648710.korean: 유미 씨가 해야 할 일이 남아있어요.

1000648711.english: You must do it, if only to atone.
1000648711.korean: 속죄하기 위해서라도 꼭 해야만 하는 일이에요.

1000648713.english: You know the refugees who joined us this time?

1000648714.english: And the ones who’ll join in the future—help them adapt to life on the Orca.
1000648714.korean: 그리고 앞으로 합류하게 될 분들을 오르카 호에 적응할 수 있도록 도와주세요.

1000648715.english: Beyond that, you’ll also have to work with the Orca’s Yumi on managing the information network, provide expert advice on understanding PECS’s network structure, and various other things...
1000648715.korean: 그것 말고도 오르카 호의 유미 씨랑 같이 정보망도 담당해주셔야 하고, PECS의 네트워크 구조 파악에 대해 전문가로서 자문도 해주셔야하고, 또 기타 등등...

1000648716.english: Anyway, you’ve got lots of work to do~
1000648716.korean: 어쨌든 해야 할 일이 무~지 많으세요.

1000648717.english: You’ll probably be so busy you won’t even have time to breathe. Your skin will get rough, you won’t sleep properly, and on your days off you’ll just sleep all day...
1000648717.korean: 아마 눈 코 뜰새 없이 바쁠 거에요. 피부는 마구 거칠어지고, 잠은 제대로 못 자서 휴일에는 잠만 자고...

1000648718.english: Except for when you roll around and play with me sometimes, you’ll be working all day long. That’s how much you’ll have to do—so much you won’t be able to think about anything else. So...
1000648718.korean: 가끔씩 저랑 뒹굴거리며 노는 걸 제외하고는 하루종일 일만 하실 거예요. 그만큼 해주셔야 할 일이 많아요. 다른 데에 신경 못 쓸 만큼요. 그러니까...

1000648719.english: You absolutely have to come back with me. Got it?
1000648719.korean: 꼭, 저랑 같이 돌아가셔야 돼요. 아시겠죠?

1000648721.english: You’re right, there’s still something I have to do...
1000648721.korean: 맞네요, 제가 해야 할 일이 남아있었어요...

1000648722.english: For the refugees... something I must do...

1000648723.english: Wait a moment, there’s a signal on the panel—huh...?

1000648725.english: Reinforcements from the Orca have arrived, and the column is moving again!
1000648725.korean: 오르카 호에서 지원군이 도착해서, 대열이 다시 이동 중이래요!

1000648728.english: Then we should also... ah, shall I help you walk?

1000648729.english: It’s fine, I can move on my own...

1000648731.english: ...Because I have to do what must be done.

1000648734.english: Yes. This column is the last, and once you and the inside collaborator get out, it’ll be complete.
1000648734.korean: 예. 이 대열이 마지막이고, 오렌지에이드님과 내부 협력자분만 빠져나오시면 됩니다.

1000648735.english: …I'll take measures to prevent anyone from passing through this area.

1000648738.english: Every time I head to the battlefield, I steel myself.
1000648738.korean: 저는 전장에 나설 때마다 각오를 다져요.

1000648739.english: Because, you know, being a soldier... war always means death is right around the corner.
1000648739.korean: 그렇잖아요. 군인이란... 전쟁이란 언제나 죽음이 코앞에 있는 거니까요.

1000648740.english: Killing others means you could be killed at any moment too.
1000648740.korean: 남을 죽인다는 건 언제든 자기도 죽을 수 있다는 거잖아요.

1000648742.english: But these people aren't like that.

1000648744.english: ...I think I understand why PECS indiscriminately shelled unarmed refugees.
1000648744.korean: ...PECS가 비무장 난민분들을 무차별 포격한 이유를 알 것 같아요.

1000648746.english: What will you do, Colonel? The factory's location has been confirmed after this attack.
1000648746.korean: 어떻게 하시겠습니까, 대령님. 이번 공격으로 공장이 위치는 파악됐습니다.

1000648747.english: Is A-87 Banshee thinking the same as me?

1000648748.english: I'm not sure what exactly the Colonel is thinking, but...
1000648748.korean: 대령님이 무슨 생각을 하고 계신지는 잘 모르겠습니다만...

1000648749.english: I intend to teach the enemy the value of life.
1000648749.korean: 적에게 생명의 소중함에 대해서 알려주려고 합니다.

1000648750.english: So you think the same as I do.

1000648751.english: Let's go, A-87 Banshee. Let's turn everything to ashes.

1000648752.english: Kyahaha, where do you think you’re going?

1000648753.english: You’ve got to take a bomb as a free gift!

1000648754.english: Hyena, I caught all of those myself!
1000648754.korean: 하이에나, 그거 내가 다 잡은 건데!

1000648755.english: Pretty cheap of you to snatch someone else’s catch, huh?

1000648756.english: Why are you fighting over something like that again.
1000648756.korean: 뭘 또 그런 걸로 싸우고 있어.

1000648757.english: The Commander is ahead, we’ve got to hurry and catch up!

1000648758.english: Okay, then we just have to burn everything left here, right?
1000648758.korean: 오케이, 그럼 여기 남은 것들 전부 태워버리면 되지?

1000648759.english: We’re busy, so leave the flames to me. Don’t just stand there watching again.
1000648759.korean: 바쁘니까 불만 놔. 또 구경하고 있지말고.

1000648760.english: Burning Walker... the more I see it, the more I want to ride it at least once...
1000648760.korean: 버닝 워커... 볼수록 한번쯤 타보고 싶단 말이야...

1000648761.english: A-15 Salamander, can’t I try it this time?
1000648761.korean: 샐러맨더, 이번엔 내가 해보면 안 돼?

1000648763.english: Only two people are set to ride the Burning Walker: me and the Commander.
1000648763.korean: 버닝 워커를 탈 수 있는 사람은 단 둘로 정해뒀어. 나랑 사령관.

1000648764.english: Anyway, we’ve dealt with this enemy...

1000648765.english: Isn’t it about time for PECS’s main force to push in?

1000648766.english: By the timing, they should be showing up, but I don’t see them yet.
1000648766.korean: 시간상 나타날 때이긴 한데, 아직 안 보이네요.

1000648767.english: But there’s one thing that bothers me...
1000648767.korean: 그런데 한 가지 마음에 걸리는 점이...

1000648768.english: Go on, say again that what bothers you is the Commander’s underwear color today. I swear...
1000648768.korean: 또 사령관님 오늘 속옷 색깔이 마음에 걸린다고 해 봐. 아주 그냥...

1000648769.english: Well, that does bother me too, but this is something more.
1000648769.korean: 그것도 물론 마음에 걸리지만, 그것보다 더요.

1000648770.english: When we scouted, there were hardly any Iron Bugs around here, right? And even if there were, most just stayed in their own territory.
1000648770.korean: 정찰했을 땐 이 주변에 철충들이 거의 없었잖아요? 있어도 대부분 자기 구역에서 가만히 있었고요.

1000648771.english: But their movements are strange now. Some are coming in from outside the detection range, and PECS seems more concerned about the Iron Bugs than us.
1000648771.korean: 그런데 지금 움직임이 이상해요. 감지 범위 바깥에서부터 이동해오는 녀석들도 있고, PECS측도 저희보다 철충에 더 신경쓰기 시작했어요.

1000648773.english: Isn’t it just because we made such a racket with that fight? It’s happened plenty of times before.
1000648773.korean: 우리가 워낙 요란하게 한 판 벌여서 그런거 아냐? 그런적 많았잖아.

1000648774.english: That could be the case too.

1000648777.english: Commander, about the injury from earlier...

1000648778.english: I already had first aid done.

1000648782.english: Wh-what is this! Why is this happening!

1000648785.english: Phew... thanks, Commander. That really startled me!

1000648786.english: Where did you find this fluid, A-15 Salamander?

1000648787.english: We fought a few Iron Bugs earlier, guess one still alive latched onto the Burning Walker.
1000648787.korean: 아까 철충 몇 마리랑 교전했었는데 버닝 워커에 살아있던 놈이 붙어있었나봐.

1000648788.english: But it’s a unit without modules—it shouldn’t be able to parasitize. What is this?
1000648788.korean: 모듈이 없는 기체라 기생할 수 없는데 뭐지?

1000648789.english: ...And it didn’t even try to flee.

1000648790.english: Could it be that movement just now... was it trying to parasitize A-15 Salamander?
1000648790.korean: 방금 그 움직임은, 설마 샐러맨더에게 기생하려고 했던 게 아닐까요?

1000648791.english: Don’t say stuff like that, it gives me chills!

1000648792.english: How could a Iron Bug parasitize us? That’s impossible!
1000648792.korean: 철충이 우리한테 어떻게 기생해? 절대 무리지.

1000648795.english: We need to lure the PECS forces farther from the airport, to buy time to respond if anything happens. Let’s push deeper inland.
1000648795.korean: PECS 병력을 공항과 멀어지도록 유인해서 무슨 일이 생겨도 대응할 시간을 벌어줘야겠군. 내륙으로 좀 더 깊숙이 들어가지.

1000648798.english: The last of the refugees are boarding the transport.

1000648802.english: ...Do you remember what we talked about earlier?

1000648803.english: For these refugees, and for those who’ll come in the future, there’s a lot you’ll need to do. I’ll be working hard too.
1000648803.korean: 이번에 온 난민분들, 그리고 앞으로 올 분들을 위해서 유미 씨가 해주셔야 할 일이 많아요. 저도 마찬가지로 노력할 거고요.

1000648804.english: Oh, right. I really meant it when I said we should share a room—huh?
1000648804.korean: 맞다. 제가 같은 방을 쓰자고 했던 건 진심이니까- 어?

1000648808.english: Your Majesty, Doom Bringer’s reserve unit has destroyed the newly discovered factory and is returning.
1000648808.korean: 폐하, 둠 브링어의 예비대가 새로 발견된 공장을 파괴하고 복귀중입니다.

1000648809.english: The Horde is luring PECS forces inland. They reported that the Iron Bugs are becoming more active.
1000648809.korean: 호드는 내륙으로 PECS의 병력을 유인 중. 철충들이 활동적이 되어 간다고 보고했습니다.

1000648810.english: And the transport carrying the last refugee group is preparing for takeoff.
1000648810.korean: 그리고 마지막 난민 그룹을 태운 수송기가 이륙 준비중이에요.

1000648811.english: - Along with the order for the scattered units across Vancouver to slowly pull back the front, May was authorized to destroy the last bridge connecting the airport to the city center.
1000648811.korean: - 밴쿠버 전역에 흩어져 있는 대원들에게 천천히 전선을 물리라는 지시와 함께 메이에게는 공항과 도심을 이어주는 마지막 다리의 파괴를 승인했다.

1000648812.english: - The Armored Maiden will return aboard the transport that just arrived at the airport... and soon, the Horde too—
1000648812.korean: - 아머드 메이든은 방금 막 공항에 도착한 수송기 편으로 복귀할거고... 곧 호드에게도-

1000648813.english: This is the Invincible Dragon. Relay to the main force!

1000648814.english: One enemy warship. Gamma’s flagship, the Annihilator.

1000648815.english: It is breaking through the defensive line and charging toward Vancouver!

1000648817.english: - Static filled the screen as the transmission was cut.

1000648819.english: - On the tactical map, the mark denoting Gamma’s flagship was slowly, but unmistakably, advancing north along the strait.
1000648819.korean: - 전술 지도에 감마의 기함을 표시하는 마크가 천천히, 하지만 확실하게 해협을 따라 북상하고 있었다.

1000648824.english: No issues. I'll share the route first.

1000648825.english: Seems like I'm seeing you for the first time. Did Dragon bring you?
1000648825.korean: 처음 보는 것 같은데, 용이 데려온 건가?

1000648826.english: Both of you, I'm counting on you.

1000648828.english: By the way, can you two fight? If you don't want to, you can stay back.
1000648828.korean: 그런데, 둘은 싸울 수 있겠어? 원하지 않으면 후방으로 가도 괜찮아.

1000648829.english: Thanks. Both of you will be a great help. Then, during the meeting—
1000648829.korean: 고마워. 둘 다 큰 힘이 되겠어. 그럼 회의할 동안 잠깐-

1000648830.english: No need to swap gear. I'll contact the mess hall, so you can eat while we have the meeting.
1000648830.korean: 바꿀 건 안 줘도 돼. 식당에 연락해 둘 테니까, 우리 회의할 동안 밥 먹고 있으면 되겠다.

1000648831.english: Use it. There's a branch of the Sanan Supplies Store inside the ship, so you can buy whatever you need there.
1000648831.korean: 쓰지. 함내에 삼안 물자 영업소 지부가 있으니까 거기서 필요한 거 사도 돼.

1000648833.english: After eating, go to the supply warehouse and pick up any supplies you need.
1000648833.korean: 밥 먹고 나면 물자 창고로 가서 필요한 물품 불출해가고.

1000648840.english: For the sake of the crew of the Orca, I'll do anything.
1000648840.korean: 오르카 호 대원들을 위해서라면, 나는 뭐든지 할 거야.

1000648842.english: It was to let PECS—and even the small Bioroid communities—know about us.
1000648842.korean: PECS는 물론, 작은 바이오로이드 공동체들에게 우리를 알리기 위해서였지.

1000648843.english: If only we had captured Omega back then...

1000648846.english: What about the movements of the other Lemonades?

1000648847.english: Have you contacted the leader of the refugee group?

1000648848.english: No. The operation will go ahead.

1000648851.english: Glad to hear you're doing okay...

1000648852.english: Haven't met with the internal collaborator yet?

1000648855.english: Hmm... got it for now. Could become a variable. Orangeade, hang in there a little longer.
1000648855.korean: 흠... 일단 알겠어. 변수가 될지도 모르겠군. 오렌지에이드는 조금만 더 고생해줘.

1000648859.english: Yeah. You can tell me anytime.

1000648861.english: Time's urgent, so let's get started right away.

1000648862.english: Dragon. I heard there's been a change in the situation.

1000648864.english: Got it. Even with the current info, the operation can proceed.
1000648864.korean: 알았어. 지금의 정보로도 작전엔 문제 없어.

1000648867.english: Dragon, do you know anything about Gamma?
1000648867.korean: 용, 감마에 대해서 알고 있는 게 있어?

1000648875.english: Surrender now and obey my orders.

1000648876.english: Is that so? Can't be helped then.

1000648878.english: Gamma isn't the type to be skilled in intelligence warfare like Alpha?
1000648878.korean: 감마는... 알파처럼 정보전에 능한 타입이 아닌건가?

1000648887.english: Right, you're the one who shared information with us...?
1000648887.korean: 그래, 네가 우리에게 정보를 공유해 준...?

1000648888.english: Sorry, but this is urgent. Identify yourself.

1000648893.english: Calm down, you don't have to say anything.

1000648895.english: Do you understand what this means?

1000648898.english: Are there likely to be more variables during the operation?
1000648898.korean: 작전 중에 생길만한 변수가 더 있을까?

1000648900.english: Understood. Focus on guiding the refugees, Orangeade.

1000648901.english: I'll leave that to you. Contact me immediately if anything happens.
1000648901.korean: 그쪽 일은 맡길게. 문제 생기면 바로 연락해.

1000648902.english: How's the situation at the airport?

1000648906.english: No sign that PECS main forces will move?

1000648907.english: Alpha, do you know anything about Yumi?
1000648907.korean: 알파, 유미에 대해 아는 게 있어?

1000648910.english: We won't know until she tells us herself.
1000648910.korean: 본인이 직접 말해주기 전까지는 알 수 없겠네.

1000648912.english: Cardinal Armand, how's the supply status for the local personnel?

1000648918.english: It makes sense, given the chaos of the fighting.
1000648918.korean: 그럴만도 해. 이렇게 요란하게 싸우고 있으니까.

1000648919.english: Alright. Tell them to be careful until the end, and tell the horde to prepare to retreat.
1000648919.korean: 알았어. 마지막까지 조심하라고 하고, 호드에게도 복귀할 준비하라고 전해줘.

1000648923.english: Put the whole unit on alert and change the transport flight routes! Tell Doom Bringer not to come near the flagship.
1000648923.korean: 전 부대에 비상 걸고 수송기 경로 변경해! 둠 브링어한테는 기함에 얼씬도 하지 말라고 하고.

1000648926.english: Sia, are you finished on your end?

1000648928.english: I counted every single one, just like Empi Sis said.
1000648928.korean: 엠피 언니 말대로 전~부 다 셌어.

1000648929.english: Good job. Since the Commander said bonuses will be given according to achievements...
1000648929.korean: 잘했어. 사령관님이 전공에 따라 상여금도 주신다고 했으니까...

1000648930.english: Then, then—can we get lots of tuna cans? Mol...ta? Can we go back there and meet the other sisters again?
1000648930.korean: 그럼그럼, 참치캔 많이 받을 수 있어? 몰...타? 거기 다시 가서 다른 언니들 만날 수 있어?

1000648932.english: Sure. Let’s bring back lots of tasty things too.

1000648934.english: Nice to meet you. I’m Amphitrite.

1000648936.english: Pleased to meet you. I’m Sirene, adjutant to the great Captain Dragon.
1000648936.korean: 반가워요, 저는 무적의 용 대장님의 부관을 맡고 있는 세이렌이에요.

1000648937.english: This is the first time I’m working with you two, so I came to help... is it already over?
1000648937.korean: 두 분이랑 작전을 하는 건 처음이라 도우러 왔는데... 다 끝난 건가요?

1000648940.english: I see. Then, please come with me.

1000648941.english: The Captain is waiting for you.

1000648945.english: Then I’ll go finish the rest of my preparations.
1000648945.korean: 저는 그럼 준비를 마저 하러 갈게요.

1000648950.english: As we discussed before, use the archipelago’s terrain to block the enemy fleet’s advance.
1000648950.korean: 일전에 이야기한대로, 군도 지형을 이용해 적 함대의 진격을 저지해주시오.

1000648951.english: But there’s no need to overdo it. Our goal is only to tie down the enemy’s movements.
1000648951.korean: 다만, 무리할 필요는 없소. 우리의 목적은 어디까지나 적의 발을 묶는 거니까.

1000648952.english: So just blast away, right? Sia’s suuuper good at that.
1000648952.korean: 빵빵 쏘면 되는 거지? 시아, 엄~청 잘 해.

1000648955.english: It’s fine. Hm, I’d like you to get along well with the Horizon squad members.
1000648955.korean: 괜찮소. 음, 호라이즌 부대원들하고 잘 어울려 줬으면 좋겠군.

1000648956.english: Yes. I just greeted Lady Sirene a little while ago.
1000648956.korean: 네. 조금 전에 세이렌 님과는 인사를 했습니다.

1000648957.english: Then you’ll become friends in no time.

1000648958.english: Lord Dragon, but... who is Gamma? I heard the name just now.
1000648958.korean: 용님, 근데 감마는 누구야? 조금 아까 들었어.

1000648959.english: I see. You two should also know the enemy we’re facing.
1000648959.korean: 그렇군. 그대들도 우리가 싸워야하는 적에 대해 알아야 하겠지.

1000648962.english: Only that she is said to be obsessively fixated on Captain Dragon the Invincible.
1000648962.korean: 무적의 용 대장님에게 몹시 집착하고 있다는 사실만 알고 있습니다.

1000648963.english: Indeed. To tell you the conclusion first—Gamma and I have already clashed once before.
1000648963.korean: 그렇소. 그리고 결론부터 말하자면, 소관과 감마는 이미 맞붙은 적이 있소.
