1000648965.english: …After the Doomsday War broke out, the corporations joined hands to form the United Human Army.
1000648965.korean: ...멸망 전쟁이 발발한 후, 각 기업들은 손을 잡고 인류 연합군을 구성했소.

1000648966.english: The navy was no exception. I was made Commander-in-Chief, while Gamma held the post of Vice-Commander.
1000648966.korean: 해군 또한 마찬가지였고, 소관이 총사령관, 감마가 부사령관직을 맡았지.

1000648967.english: Oooh… then Lord Dragon was the Commander?

1000648968.english: Now, I am nothing more than a soldier serving my lord.
1000648968.korean: 지금은 그저 주군을 모시는 군인일 뿐이오.

1000648969.english: If Gamma was the deputy commander... did she betray you?

1000648970.english: Not exactly. It was a matter of differing ideals.

1000648971.english: After the humans who commanded me all fell into their slumber, I sought to join Amina Jones with those who shared my will.
1000648971.korean: 소관에게 명령권을 행사하던 인간들이 전부 잠들고 난 뒤, 소관은 뜻을 같이하는 이들과 함께 아미나 존스에게 합류하려 했소.

1000648972.english: Gamma, leading her own forces, stood in my way… and battle broke out.
1000648972.korean: 감마는 자신의 세력을 이끌고 그런 소관을 막아섰고... 전투가 벌어졌지.

1000648973.english: We fought for days on end. Both sides grew exhausted and withdrew, but… had I known it would come to this, I should have finished it back then…
1000648973.korean: 몇날며칠을 싸웠소. 그때는 소관과 감마 양쪽 모두 지쳐서 물러났지만... 이럴 줄 알았으면 그때 끝을 보았어야 하는것을...

1000648974.english: Then let us end it here and now! Sia and I will lend you our strength.
1000648974.korean: 지금 이자리에서 끝을 내면 됩니다. 저와 시아가 돕겠습니다.

1000648977.english: The enemy fleet will enter the operation zone shortly.
1000648977.korean: 적 함대도 곧 작전 지역으로 들어올 예정이에요.

1000648980.english: Remember the directive: maintain distance from the enemy vessels at all costs.
1000648980.korean: 적 함선과 거리를 유지하라는 지침, 절대로 잊지 마시오.

1000648981.english: (At the same time, aboard Gamma’s flagship)

1000648983.english: So, you finally make your move!

1000648984.english: When Rock Harbor fell, when you said you’d enter slumber, I thought I’d never cross blades with you again…
1000648984.korean: 락 하버가 멸망하고, 무적의 용... 네가 동면에 들어간다고 했을 땐 다신 맞붙지 못할 거라 생각했는데...

1000648985.english: Ha! Perhaps I should’ve bowed in thanks to that human.
1000648985.korean: 하하, 그 인간에게 감사하다고 절이라도 할 걸 그랬군.

1000648986.english: It’s as if they knew exactly what I desired—preparing such a magnificent war for me!
1000648986.korean: 내가 원하는 게 뭔지 알고 있었던 것처럼, 이런 최고의 전쟁을 준비해줬으니 말이야!

1000648987.english: Then let’s begin, Dragon. All ships…!

1000648991.english: They’re closing in on the mines we deployed!

1000648992.english: …Strange. They should’ve picked us up on radar, yet they’re just barging straight through.
1000648992.korean: ...이상해. 분명히 레이더로 우리의 움직임을 확인했을텐데 막무가내로 밀고들어오고 있어.

1000648993.english: The difference in strength is clear, but still…

1000648994.english: If they drop their guard, that only works in our favor!

1000648995.english: Lead enemy vessel—distance to the mines, 50 meters!
1000648995.korean: 적 선두 함선. 기뢰와의 거리, 앞으로 50미터!

1000648997.english: Explosion detected on the bow of the lead cruiser! Fire breaking out!
1000648997.korean: 적 함대 선두, 순양함 선수부에서 기뢰 폭발 관측. 화재 발생!

1000648998.english: Flooding confirmed on the lead vessel. Looks like the engine’s been hit too!
1000648998.korean: 선두 함선, 침수 확인. 엔진에까지 영향을 준 것 같아요!

1000648999.english: Kyahaha! The ships following behind are caught in the mines as well!
1000648999.korean: 꺄하핫! 뒤따르던 군함도 기뢰에 휘말리고 있어요.

1000649000.english: P-3M Undine, let’s join the fight!

1000649002.english: Naval mines and anti-ship missiles… focusing fire by using favorable terrain, huh…
1000649002.korean: 기뢰와 대함 미사일... 유리한 지형을 이용해 화력을 집중한다라...

1000649003.english: Not bad. Not good either, though.

1000649004.english: Well, it’s been a while, and they’ve got the numbers, so maybe I’ll give them a little advantage.
1000649004.korean: 뭐, 오랜만이기도 하고 머릿수도 차이나니 어드밴티지를 좀 줘볼까.

1000649006.english: Vice-captain, the operation is going well!

1000649007.english: Their ships are blocking their own path with wreckage—they’ll be tangled up in no time!
1000649007.korean: 쟤네들은 자기편 함선 잔해에 길이 막혀서 서로 엉킬거야!

1000649008.english: But the enemy rear is moving strangely.

1000649009.english: It’s like… they’re letting it happen.

1000649011.english: Annihilator, status of Main Gun No. 1.

1000649013.english: Fire as soon as it’s ready.

1000649015.english: This much… is what it takes to call the start of a war…!
1000649015.korean: 이 정도는 돼야... 전쟁의 개막이라고 할 수 있으니까...!

1000649017.english: Confirmed: enemy flagship has fired Main Gun No. 1!

1000649018.english: Point of impact… the enemy fleet’s vanguard!

1000649019.english: The ships—and their wreckage—are gone without a trace!
1000649019.korean: 적 함선들과 함께... 잔해들도 모두 사라졌어요!

1000649020.english: After all these years, you still haven’t changed.

1000649021.english: No… you’ve become even more than you were then…

1000649022.english: Did they fire on allied ships...?

1000649024.english: That person called Delta... did that...

1000649025.english: She just gunned down her own friends!

1000649026.english: It’s okay, Sia. That’s not Delta, that’s Gamma.
1000649026.korean: 괜찮아, 시아. 저건 델타가 아니라 감마야.

1000649027.english: And right now, we’re fighting alongside Captain Dragon the Invincible. It’s okay.
1000649027.korean: 그리고 지금 우리는 무적의 용 대장님과 함께 싸우고 있어. 괜찮아.

1000649029.english: Cia, don’t be afraid. You will be fine.
1000649029.korean: 시아, 안 무서워. 참을 수 있어.

1000649032.english: Hooh, a Mermaid? I heard they’d been completely wiped out...

1000649033.english: An old enemy—perfect as an appetizer before the real showdown with Dragon!
1000649033.korean: 오랜 적이라, 본격적으로 용과 맞붙기 전의 전채요리로 딱이로군.

1000649034.english: Well then... let’s even out the weight class a little, shall we?

1000649035.english: Entire fleet, reduce speed. Only fast attack boats and patrol ships, full speed ahead!
1000649035.korean: 전 함대 속력을 늦춘다. 고속정과 초계함만 전속 항진.

1000649038.english: Relative bearing from Amphitrite, 167.5 degrees. Relative bearing from Salacia, 270.5 degrees! Six enemy fast attack boats spotted!
1000649038.korean: 엠피트리테 기준 방위 167.5도, 살라시아 기준 방위 270.5도! 적 고속정 6척 발견!

1000649039.english: Salacia in pursuit, confirmed all 6 destroyed. Again, relative bearing from Salacia, 35 degrees—2 patrol ships approaching!
1000649039.korean: 살라시아가 추적, 6척 완파 확인. 다시 살라시아 기준 방위 35도, 초계함 2척 접근 중!

1000649040.english: I’ll take those! MH-4 Thetis, hold your position!
1000649040.korean: 저건 내가 처리할게! 테티스는 위치 지켜!

1000649041.english: It’s fine. I can handle them.

1000649042.english: Confirmed direct hit on the enemy patrol ship with a full main gun barrage!
1000649042.korean: 적 초계함에게 주포 일제사격 명중 확인.

1000649045.english: They’re still coming! Bearing 165 degrees from MH-4 Thetis! Nine fast attack boats, three patrol ships sighted!
1000649045.korean: 계속 오고 있어! MH-4 테티스 기준 방위 165도! 고속정 9척, 초계함 3척 출현!

1000649046.english: UAVs spotted overhead. They’re Interceptors, the standard model used by PECS!
1000649046.korean: 상공에 무인 항공기 발견. PECS의 제식 기체인 인터셉터에요!

1000649047.english: AG-1 Nereid, Vice-Captain! Please intercept the enemy fighters heading toward the archipelago’s defense base. I’ll go intercept them too!
1000649047.korean: 네레이드, 부함장님! 군도의 방어 거점으로 향하는 적 전투기의 요격을 부탁드려요. 저도 요격하러 갈게요!

1000649050.english: Leave it to me, I’ll take that one down!

1000649052.english: AG-1 Nereid, what’s your ammo status?

1000649053.english: Not much left. I need to swap the belt!
1000649053.korean: 얼마 안 남았어. 탄띠 교체해야 돼!

1000649054.english: Do it now. I’ll cover in the meantime.

1000649055.english: MH-4 Thetis and P-3M Undine, support the Mermaids who’ve pushed forward!
1000649055.korean: 테티스랑 운디네는 돌출된 머메이드 분들을 지원해주세요!

1000649057.english: Hm, sometimes it’s fun to watch the little ones squabble like this.
1000649057.korean: 흐음, 가끔은 이렇게 작은 것들끼리 투닥거리는 걸 보는것도 즐겁군.

1000649058.english: Still... it’s about time we get started, Dragon.

1000649061.english: Let’s clear away the small fry before the real show begins...!

1000649067.english: Observation results... from the enemy fleet’s barrage...
1000649067.korean: 관측 결과... 적 함대의 일제 포격으로...

1000649068.english: Two islands in the strait... have vanished...!

1000649069.english: The enemy patrol fleet caught in the bombardment...

1000649072.english: ...So that’s how you’re going to play it, Gamma!

1000649073.english: I don’t normally favor such gambits... but right now, it can’t be helped.
1000649073.korean: 이런 도박수는 선호하지 않소만... 지금은 어쩔 수 없겠구려.

1000649074.english: I can see more deck than ocean…

1000649075.english: At this rate, there’s no point in observing, hyaah?!

1000649077.english: There are too many enemy ships! It’s hard enough just to evade, Vice-Commander!
1000649077.korean: 적 함선이 너무 많아! 회피기동하기도 벅차요, 부함장님!

1000649079.english: V-Vice-Commander. AG-1 Nereid’s ammo belts are almost gone!
1000649079.korean: 부, 부함장님. 네리가 가져온 탄띠가 다 떨어져 가고 있어.

1000649081.english: We have to hold out somehow!

1000649082.english: If we break, the airport will…!

1000649085.english: Immediately pull the defense line back to the coordinates transmitted by my office.
1000649085.korean: 즉시 소관이 송신한 지점까지 방어선을 물리시오.

1000649086.english: That’s right behind the archipelago. If we rebuild the line there…
1000649086.korean: 군도 바로 뒤쪽이네요. 이곳에 다시 방어선을 구축하면...

1000649087.english: The area to cover gets a bit wider, but we can do it!
1000649087.korean: 막아야할 범위가 조금 넓어지긴 하지만, 할 수 있어!

1000649088.english: Being closer to the rear means we can receive supplies. I’ll have my office relay that to the main force.
1000649088.korean: 후방과 거리가 가까워지니 보급을 받을 수 있을것이오. 소관이 본대에 전달해두겠소.

1000649089.english: And no matter what happens, you must not abandon your position.
1000649089.korean: 그리고 무슨 일이 있어도 위치를 벗어나서는 안되오.

1000649090.english: ......Yes. I’ll hold the line, no matter what!

1000649091.english: Thank you. It’s truly fortunate to have you here, Vice-Commander Sirene.
1000649091.korean: 고맙소. 세이렌 부함장이 있어서 정말 다행이오.

1000649093.english: So, you’re pulling the defense line back.

1000649094.english: A wise choice. That little fleet you’re leading—if it clashed head-on with mine, it would be crushed in an instant.
1000649094.korean: 현명한 판단이군. 지금 네가 이끌고 있는 자그마한 함대 따위, 내 함대와 정면으로 맞부딪히면 순식간에 박살날테니까.

1000649095.english: But how far can you really run, Dragon? You’re running out of room to retreat, aren’t you? Hahaha…!
1000649095.korean: 그래도 어디까지 도망칠 수 있겠어, 용? 슬슬 물러날 수 없는 곳이잖아? 하하하...!

1000649097.english: Annihilator, zoom in on the peak of that island!

1000649103.english: I, the Invincible Dragon, am right here!

1000649105.english: Captain?! Why are you on the island alone…

1000649106.english: If the enemy bombards, it’ll be dangerous!

1000649107.english: Don’t tell me… what you said earlier…

1000649108.english: Vice-Commander! We have to go save her!

1000649110.english: …The Captain gave us his orders. To build the defense line and hold this position.
1000649110.korean: ...대장님의 명령이 있었어요. 방어선을 구축하고 위치를 사수하라고요.
